33 class UniTensorType_class {
34 public:
35 enum : int { Void = -99, Dense = 0, Sparse = 1, Block = 2, BlockFermionic = 3 };
36 std::string getname(const int &ut_type) const;
37 };

56 extern UniTensorType_class UTenType;
57
59 // class DenseUniTensor;
60 class UniTensor_base : public intrusive_ptr_base<UniTensor_base> {
61 public:
62 int uten_type_id; // the unitensor type id.
63 bool _is_braket_form;
64 bool _is_tag;
65 bool _is_diag;
66 cytnx_int64 _rowrank;
67 std::string _name;
68 std::vector<std::string> _labels;
69 std::vector<Bond> _bonds;
70
71 bool _update_braket() {
72 if (_bonds.size() == 0) return false;
73
74 if (this->_bonds[0].type() != bondType::BD_REG) {
75 // check:
76 for (unsigned int i = 0; i < this->_bonds.size(); i++) {
77 if (i < this->_rowrank) {
78 if (this->_bonds[i].type() != bondType::BD_KET) return false;
79 } else {
80 if (this->_bonds[i].type() != bondType::BD_BRA) return false;
81 }
82 }
83 return true;
84 } else {
85 return false;
86 }
87 }
88
89 friend class UniTensor; // allow wrapper to access the private elems
90 friend class DenseUniTensor;
91 friend class BlockUniTensor;
92 friend class BlockFermionicUniTensor;
93
94 UniTensor_base()
95 : _is_tag(false),
96 _name(std::string("")),
97 _is_braket_form(false),
98 _rowrank(0),
99 _is_diag(false),
100 uten_type_id(UTenType.Void){};
101
102 // copy&assignment constr., use intrusive_ptr's !!
103 UniTensor_base(const UniTensor_base &rhs);
104 UniTensor_base &operator=(UniTensor_base &rhs);
105
106 cytnx_uint64 rowrank() const { return this->_rowrank; }
107 bool is_diag() const { return this->_is_diag; }
108 const bool &is_braket_form() const { return this->_is_braket_form; }
109 const bool &is_tag() const { return this->_is_tag; }
110 const std::vector<std::string> &labels() const { return this->_labels; }
117 cytnx_int64 get_index(std::string label) const {
118 std::vector<std::string> labels = this->_labels;
119 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < labels.size(); i++) {
120 if (labels[i] == label) return i;
121 }
122 return -1;
123 }
124 const std::vector<Bond> &bonds() const { return this->_bonds; }
125 std::vector<Bond> &bonds() { return this->_bonds; }
126
127 Bond &bond_(const cytnx_uint64 &idx) {
128 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_bonds.size(), "[ERROR][bond] index %d out of bound, total %d\n",
129 idx, this->_bonds.size());
130 return this->_bonds[idx];
131 }
132
133 Bond &bond_(const std::string &label) {
134 auto res = std::find(this->_labels.begin(), this->_labels.end(), label);
135 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_labels.end(), "[ERROR] label %s not exists.\n", label.c_str());
136 cytnx_uint64 idx = std::distance(this->_labels.begin(), res);
137
138 return this->bond_(idx);
139 }
140
141 const std::string &name() const { return this->_name; }
142 cytnx_uint64 rank() const { return this->_labels.size(); }
143 void set_name(const std::string &in) { this->_name = in; }
144
156 void set_label(const std::string &oldlabel, const std::string &new_label) {
157 cytnx_int64 idx;
158 auto res = std::find(this->_labels.begin(), this->_labels.end(), oldlabel);
159 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_labels.end(), "[ERROR] label %s not exists.\n",
160 oldlabel.c_str());
161 idx = std::distance(this->_labels.begin(), res);
162
163 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_labels.size(), "[ERROR] index exceed the rank of UniTensor%s",
164 "\n");
165 // check in:
166 bool is_dup = false;
167 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_labels.size(); i++) {
168 if (i == idx) continue;
169 if (new_label == this->_labels[i]) {
170 is_dup = true;
171 break;
172 }
173 }
174 cytnx_error_msg(is_dup, "[ERROR] alreay has a label that is the same as the input label%s",
175 "\n");
176 this->_labels[idx] = new_label;
177 }
178 void set_label(const cytnx_int64 &inx, const std::string &new_label) {
179 cytnx_error_msg(inx < 0, "[ERROR] index is negative%s", "\n");
180 cytnx_error_msg(inx >= this->_labels.size(), "[ERROR] index exceed the rank of UniTensor%s",
181 "\n");
182 // check in:
183 bool is_dup = false;
184 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_labels.size(); i++) {
185 if (i == inx) continue;
186 if (new_label == this->_labels[i]) {
187 is_dup = true;
188 break;
189 }
190 }
191 cytnx_error_msg(is_dup, "[ERROR] alreay has a label that is the same as the input label%s",
192 "\n");
193 this->_labels[inx] = new_label;
194 }
195
196 [[deprecated("Please use relabel_(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels) instead.")]] void
197 set_labels(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
198 void relabel_(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels); // implemented
199 [[deprecated("Please use relabel_(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels) instead.")]] void
200 relabels_(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels); // implemented
201 void relabel_(const std::vector<std::string> &old_labels,
202 const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels); // implemented
203 [[deprecated(
204 "Please use relabel_(const std::vector<std::string> &old_labels, const "
205 "std::vector<std::string> &new_labels) instead.")]] void
206 relabels_(const std::vector<std::string> &old_labels,
207 const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels); // implemented
208 void relabel_(const std::string &old_label, const std::string &new_label) {
209 this->set_label(old_label, new_label);
210 }
211 void relabel_(const cytnx_int64 &inx, const std::string &new_label) {
212 this->set_label(inx, new_label);
213 }
214
215 int uten_type() { return this->uten_type_id; }
216 std::string uten_type_str() const { return UTenType.getname(this->uten_type_id); }

351 // arithmetic
352 // internal/advanced: the UniTensor-vs-UniTensor overloads below (Add_/Mul_/Sub_/Div_
353 // taking a boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>) are not TN operations; python surface
354 // removed per #934. See operator+(const UniTensor&, const UniTensor&) in
355 // include/linalg.hpp for the full rationale. The Scalar overloads (scalar scaling)
356 // remain fully public, including from python.
357 virtual void Add_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
358 virtual void Add_(const Scalar &rhs);
359
360 virtual void Mul_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
361 virtual void Mul_(const Scalar &rhs);
362
363 virtual void Sub_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
364 virtual void Sub_(const Scalar &rhs);
365 virtual void lSub_(const Scalar &lhs);
366
367 virtual void Div_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
368 virtual void Div_(const Scalar &rhs);
369 virtual void lDiv_(const Scalar &lhs);
370

452
453 //======================================================================
455 class DenseUniTensor : public UniTensor_base {
456 protected:
457 public:
458 Tensor _block;
459 std::vector<Tensor> _interface_block; // this is serves as interface for get_blocks_();
460 boost::intrusive_ptr<DenseUniTensor> clone_meta() const {
461 boost::intrusive_ptr<DenseUniTensor> tmp(new DenseUniTensor());
462 tmp->_bonds = vec_clone(this->_bonds);
463 tmp->_labels = this->_labels;
464 tmp->_is_braket_form = this->_is_braket_form;
465 tmp->_rowrank = this->_rowrank;
466 tmp->_is_diag = this->_is_diag;
467 tmp->_name = this->_name;
468 tmp->_is_tag = this->_is_tag;
469 return tmp;
470 }
471 //------------------------------------------
472
473 DenseUniTensor() { this->uten_type_id = UTenType.Dense; };
474 friend class UniTensor; // allow wrapper to access the private elems
475 // virtual functions
476
477 // void Init(const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &in_labels = {},
478 // const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
479 // const int &device = Device.cpu, const bool &is_diag = false,
480 // const bool &no_alloc = false);
481
482 void Init(const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
483 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
484 const int &device = Device.cpu, const bool &is_diag = false,
485 const bool &no_alloc = false, const std::string &name = "");
486 // this only work for non-symm tensor
487 void Init_by_Tensor(const Tensor &in_tensor, const bool &is_diag = false,
488 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const std::string &name = "");
489 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> shape() const {
490 if (this->_is_diag) {
491 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> shape = this->_block.shape();
492 shape.push_back(shape[0]);
493 return shape;
494 } else {
495 return this->_block.shape();
496 }
497 }
498 bool is_blockform() const { return false; }
499 void to_(const int &device) { this->_block.to_(device); }
500 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> to(const int &device) {
501 if (this->device() == device) {
502 std::vector<Tensor> _interface_block; // this is serves as interface for get_blocks_();
503 return this;
504 } else {
505 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
506 out->to_(device);
507 return out;
508 }
509 }
510 void set_rowrank_(const cytnx_uint64 &new_rowrank) {
511 cytnx_error_msg(new_rowrank > this->_labels.size(),
512 "[ERROR] rowrank cannot exceed the rank of UniTensor.%s", "\n");
513 if (this->is_diag()) {
514 cytnx_error_msg(new_rowrank != 1, "[ERROR] rowrank should be [==1] when is_diag =true!.%s",
515 "\n");
516 }
517
518 this->_rowrank = new_rowrank;
519 }
520
521 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> set_rowrank(const cytnx_uint64 &new_rowrank) const {
522 boost::intrusive_ptr<DenseUniTensor> out_raw = this->clone_meta();
523 out_raw->_block = this->_block;
524 out_raw->set_rowrank_(new_rowrank);
525 return out_raw;
526 }
527
528 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> clone() const {
529 boost::intrusive_ptr<DenseUniTensor> tmp = this->clone_meta();
530 tmp->_block = this->_block.clone();
531 return tmp;
532 };
533 bool is_contiguous() const { return this->_block.is_contiguous(); }
534 unsigned int dtype() const { return this->_block.dtype(); }
535 int device() const { return this->_block.device(); }
536 std::string dtype_str() const { return Type.getname(this->_block.dtype()); }
537 std::string device_str() const { return Device.getname(this->_block.device()); }
547 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> permute(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper,
548 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
549 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> permute(const std::vector<std::string> &mapper,
550 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
551
560 void permute_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
561 void permute_(const std::vector<std::string> &mapper, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
562
563 void twist_(const cytnx_int64 &idx) override {
564 // do nothing for bosonic UniTensor
565 return;
566 }
567 void twist_(const std::string &label) override {
568 // do nothing for bosonic UniTensor
569 return;
570 }
571
572 void fermion_twists_() override {
573 // do nothing for bosonic UniTensor
574 return;
575 }
576
577 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
578 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabels(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
579
580 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const std::vector<std::string> &old_labels,
581 const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
582 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabels(const std::vector<std::string> &old_labels,
583 const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
584
595 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const std::string &old_label,
596 const std::string &new_label);
597 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const cytnx_int64 &inx,
598 const std::string &new_label);
599
600 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> astype(const unsigned int &dtype) const {
601 boost::intrusive_ptr<DenseUniTensor> tmp = this->clone_meta();
602 tmp->_block = this->_block.astype(dtype);
603 return tmp;
604 }
605
606 std::vector<Symmetry> syms() const {
607 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] dense unitensor does not have symmetry.%s",
608 "\n");
609 return std::vector<Symmetry>();
610 }
611
612 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> contiguous_() {
613 // Rebind _block to the non-mutating Tensor::contiguous() result instead of calling
614 // contiguous_() in place, so a block Tensor shared with another UniTensor (e.g. via
615 // relabel()) is not corrupted (#724). Tensor::contiguous() is cheap when the block is
616 // already contiguous (no data copy; same impl returned).
617 this->_block = this->_block.contiguous();
618 return boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(this);
619 }
620 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> contiguous() {
621 // if contiguous then return self!
622 if (this->is_contiguous()) {
623 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(this);
624 return out;
625 } else {
626 boost::intrusive_ptr<DenseUniTensor> tmp = this->clone_meta();
627 tmp->_block = this->_block.contiguous();
628 return tmp;
629 }
630 }
631
632 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> apply_() {
633 return boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(this);
634 }
635 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> apply() {
636 // just return self
637 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(this);
638 return out;
639 }
640
641 void print_diagram(const bool &bond_info = false) const;
642 void print_blocks(const bool &full_info = true) const;
643 void print_block(const cytnx_int64 &idx, const bool &full_info = true) const;
644 Tensor get_block() const { return this->_block.clone(); }
645 Tensor get_block(const cytnx_uint64 &idx) const {
646 cytnx_error_msg(idx != 0,
647 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] Dense tensor has only one block, block number %llu "
648 "invalid. Use get_block(0).\n",
649 (unsigned long long)idx);
650 return this->_block.clone();
651 }
652
653 Tensor get_block(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qnum, const bool &force) const {
654 cytnx_error_msg(
655 true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] try to get_block() using qnum on a non-symmetry UniTensor%s",
656 "\n");
657 return Tensor();
658 }
659 // return a share view of block, this only work for non-symm tensor.
660 const Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qnum, const bool &force) const {
661 cytnx_error_msg(
662 true,
663 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] try to get_block_() using qnum on a non-symmetry UniTensor%s",
664 "\n");
665 return this->_block;
666 }
667 Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qnum, const bool &force) {
668 cytnx_error_msg(
669 true,
670 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] try to get_block_() using qnum on a non-symmetry UniTensor%s",
671 "\n");
672 return this->_block;
673 }
674
675 // return a share view of block, this only work for non-symm tensor.
676 Tensor &get_block_() { return this->_block; }
677 Tensor &get_block_(const cytnx_uint64 &idx) {
678 cytnx_error_msg(idx != 0,
679 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] Dense tensor has only one block, block number %llu "
680 "invalid. Use get_block_(0).\n",
681 (unsigned long long)idx);
682 return this->_block;
683 }
684 // return a share view of block, this only work for non-symm tensor.
685 const Tensor &get_block_() const { return this->_block; }
686 const Tensor &get_block_(const cytnx_uint64 &idx) const {
687 cytnx_error_msg(idx != 0,
688 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] Dense tensor has only one block, block number %llu "
689 "invalid. Use get_block_(0).\n",
690 (unsigned long long)idx);
691 return this->_block;
692 }
693
694 cytnx_uint64 Nblocks() const { return 1; };
695 std::vector<Tensor> get_blocks() const {
696 std::vector<Tensor> out;
697 cytnx_error_msg(
698 true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] Cannot use get_blocks(), use get_block() instead!%s", "\n");
699 return out; // this will not share memory!!
700 }
701 const std::vector<Tensor> &get_blocks_(const bool &silent = false) const {
702 cytnx_error_msg(
703 true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] Cannot use get_blocks_(), use get_block_() instead!%s",
704 "\n");
705 return this->_interface_block; // this will not share memory!!
706 }
707 std::vector<Tensor> &get_blocks_(const bool &silent = false) {
708 cytnx_error_msg(
709 true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] Cannot use get_blocks_(), use get_block_() instead!%s",
710 "\n");
711 return this->_interface_block; // this will not share memory!!
712 }
713
714 void put_block(const Tensor &in) {
715 // We don't check the dtype for DenseUniTensor, since it'll be more convenient to change
716 // DenseUniTensor's dtype
717
718 // cytnx_error_msg(in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
719 // "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not
720 // match.%s",
721 // "\n");
722 cytnx_error_msg(in.device() != this->device(),
723 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
724 "match.%s",
725 "\n");
726 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
727 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
728 if (this->is_diag()) {
729 cytnx_error_msg(
730 in.shape() != this->_block.shape(),
731 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] the input tensor shape does not match.%s", "\n");
732 this->_block = in.clone();
733 } else {
734 cytnx_error_msg(
735 in.shape() != this->shape(),
736 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] the input tensor shape does not match.%s", "\n");
737 this->_block = in.clone();
738 }
739 }
740 void put_block(const Tensor &in, const cytnx_uint64 &idx) {
741 cytnx_error_msg(idx != 0,
742 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] Dense tensor has only one block, block number %llu "
743 "invalid. Use put_block(0).\n",
744 (unsigned long long)idx);
745 put_block(in);
746 }
747 // share view of the block
748 void put_block_(Tensor &in) {
749 // We don't check the dtype for DenseUniTensor, since it'll be more convenient to change
750 // DenseUniTensor's dtype
751
752 // cytnx_error_msg(in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
753 // "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not
754 // match.%s",
755 // "\n");
756 cytnx_error_msg(in.device() != this->device(),
757 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
758 "match.%s",
759 "\n");
760 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
761 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
762 if (this->is_diag()) {
763 cytnx_error_msg(
764 in.shape() != this->_block.shape(),
765 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] the input tensor shape does not match.%s", "\n");
766 this->_block = in;
767 } else {
768 cytnx_error_msg(
769 in.shape() != this->shape(),
770 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] the input tensor shape does not match.%s", "\n");
771 this->_block = in;
772 }
773 }
774 void put_block_(Tensor &in, const cytnx_uint64 &idx) {
775 cytnx_error_msg(idx != 0,
776 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] Dense tensor has only one block, block number %llu "
777 "invalid. Use put_block_(0).\n",
778 (unsigned long long)idx);
779 put_block_(in);
780 }
781
782 void put_block(const Tensor &in, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qnum) {
783 cytnx_error_msg(
784 true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] try to put_block using qnum on a non-symmetry UniTensor%s",
785 "\n");
786 }
787 void put_block_(Tensor &in, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qnum) {
788 cytnx_error_msg(
789 true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] try to put_block using qnum on a non-symmetry UniTensor%s",
790 "\n");
791 }
792 // these two methods only work on non-symm tensor (DenseUniTensor)
793 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> get(const std::vector<Accessor> &accessors);
794 void set(const std::vector<Accessor> &accessors, const Tensor &rhs);
795
796 void reshape_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &new_shape, const cytnx_uint64 &rowrank = 0);
797 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> reshape(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &new_shape,
798 const cytnx_uint64 &rowrank = 0);
799 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> to_dense();
800 void to_dense_();
801 void combineBond(const std::vector<std::string> &indicators, const bool &force = true);
802 void combineBonds(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indicators, const bool &force,
803 const bool &by_label);
804 void combineBonds(const std::vector<std::string> &indicators, const bool &force = true);
805 void combineBonds(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indicators, const bool &force = true);
806 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> contract(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs,
807 const bool &mv_elem_self = false,
808 const bool &mv_elem_rhs = false);
809 std::vector<Bond> getTotalQnums(const bool &physical = false) {
810 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] %s",
811 "getTotalQnums can only operate on UniTensor with symmetry.\n");
812 return std::vector<Bond>();
813 }
814
815 std::vector<std::vector<cytnx_int64>> get_blocks_qnums() const {
816 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] %s",
817 "get_blocks_qnums can only operate on UniTensor with symmetry.\n");
818 return std::vector<std::vector<cytnx_int64>>();
819 }
820
821 bool same_data(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs) const {
822 if (rhs->uten_type() != UTenType.Dense) return false;
823
824 return this->get_block_().same_data(rhs->get_block_());
825 }
826
827 ~DenseUniTensor(){};
828
829 // arithmetic
830 void Add_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
831 void Add_(const Scalar &rhs);
832
833 void Mul_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
834 void Mul_(const Scalar &rhs);
835
836 void Sub_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
837 void Sub_(const Scalar &rhs);
838 void lSub_(const Scalar &lhs);
839
840 void Div_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
841 void Div_(const Scalar &rhs);
842 void lDiv_(const Scalar &lhs);
843
844 void Conj_() { this->_block.Conj_(); };
845
846 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Conj() {
847 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
848 out->Conj_();
849 return out;
850 }
851
852 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Transpose() {
853 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
854 out->Transpose_();
855 return out;
856 }
857 void Transpose_();
858
859 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> normalize() {
860 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
861 out->normalize_();
862 return out;
863 }
864 void normalize_();
865
866 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Dagger() {
867 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->Conj();
868 out->Transpose_();
869 return out;
870 }
871 void Dagger_() {
872 this->Conj_();
873 this->Transpose_();
874 }
884 void Trace_(const cytnx_int64 &a, const cytnx_int64 &b);
885 void Trace_(const std::string &a, const std::string &b);
886 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Trace(const std::string &a, const std::string &b) {
887 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
888 out->Trace_(a, b);
889 return out;
890 }
891 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Trace(const cytnx_int64 &a, const cytnx_int64 &b) {
892 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
893 out->Trace_(a, b);
894 return out;
895 }
896
897 Tensor Norm() const;
898
899 const Scalar::Sproxy at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const {
900 cytnx_error_msg(
901 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
902 "\n");
903 return Scalar::Sproxy();
904 }
905 const cytnx_complex128 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
906 const cytnx_complex128 &aux) const {
907 cytnx_error_msg(
908 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
909 "\n");
910 return cytnx_complex128(0, 0);
911 }
912 const cytnx_complex64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
913 const cytnx_complex64 &aux) const {
914 cytnx_error_msg(
915 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
916 "\n");
917 return cytnx_complex64(0, 0);
918 }
919 const cytnx_double &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
920 const cytnx_double &aux) const {
921 cytnx_error_msg(
922 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
923 "\n");
924 return 0;
925 }
926 const cytnx_float &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
927 const cytnx_float &aux) const {
928 cytnx_error_msg(
929 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
930 "\n");
931 return 0;
932 }
