934 const cytnx_uint64 &aux) const {
935 cytnx_error_msg(
936 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
937 "\n");
938 return 0;
939 }
940 const cytnx_int64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
941 const cytnx_int64 &aux) const {
942 cytnx_error_msg(
943 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
944 "\n");
945 return 0;
946 }
947 const cytnx_uint32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
948 const cytnx_uint32 &aux) const {
949 cytnx_error_msg(
950 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
951 "\n");
952 return 0;
953 }
954 const cytnx_int32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
955 const cytnx_int32 &aux) const {
956 cytnx_error_msg(
957 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
958 "\n");
959 return 0;
960 }
961 const cytnx_uint16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
962 const cytnx_uint16 &aux) const {
963 cytnx_error_msg(
964 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
965 "\n");
966 return 0;
967 }
968 const cytnx_int16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
969 const cytnx_int16 &aux) const {
970 cytnx_error_msg(
971 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
972 "\n");
973 return 0;
974 }
975
976 Scalar::Sproxy at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) {
977 cytnx_error_msg(
978 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
979 "\n");
980 return Scalar::Sproxy();
981 }
982 cytnx_complex128 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
983 const cytnx_complex128 &aux) {
984 cytnx_error_msg(
985 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
986 "\n");
987 return *(cytnx_complex128 *)nullptr;
988 }
989 cytnx_complex64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
990 const cytnx_complex64 &aux) {
991 cytnx_error_msg(
992 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
993 "\n");
994 return *(cytnx_complex64 *)nullptr;
995 }
996 cytnx_double &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_double &aux) {
997 cytnx_error_msg(
998 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
999 "\n");
1000 return *(cytnx_double *)nullptr;
1001 }
1002 cytnx_float &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_float &aux) {
1003 cytnx_error_msg(
1004 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
1005 "\n");
1006 return *(cytnx_float *)nullptr;
1007 }
1008 cytnx_uint64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_uint64 &aux) {
1009 cytnx_error_msg(
1010 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
1011 "\n");
1012 return *(cytnx_uint64 *)nullptr;
1013 }
1014 cytnx_int64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_int64 &aux) {
1015 cytnx_error_msg(
1016 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
1017 "\n");
1018 return *(cytnx_int64 *)nullptr;
1019 }
1020 cytnx_uint32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_uint32 &aux) {
1021 cytnx_error_msg(
1022 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
1023 "\n");
1024 return *(cytnx_uint32 *)nullptr;
1025 }
1026 cytnx_int32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_int32 &aux) {
1027 cytnx_error_msg(
1028 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
1029 "\n");
1030 return *(cytnx_int32 *)nullptr;
1031 }
1032 cytnx_uint16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_uint16 &aux) {
1033 cytnx_error_msg(
1034 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
1035 "\n");
1036 return *(cytnx_uint16 *)nullptr;
1037 }
1038 cytnx_int16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_int16 &aux) {
1039 cytnx_error_msg(
1040 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
1041 "\n");
1042 return *(cytnx_int16 *)nullptr;
1043 }
1044
1045 bool elem_exists(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const {
1046 cytnx_error_msg(
1047 true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] elem_exists can only be used on UniTensor with Symmetry.%s",
1048 "\n");
1049 }
1050 void tag() {
1051 if (!this->is_tag()) {
1052 for (int i = 0; i < this->_rowrank; i++) {
1053 this->_bonds[i].set_type(BD_KET);
1054 }
1055 for (int i = this->_rowrank; i < this->_bonds.size(); i++) {
1056 this->_bonds[i].set_type(BD_BRA);
1057 }
1058 this->_is_tag = true;
1059 this->_is_braket_form = this->_update_braket();
1060 }
1061 }
1071 void truncate_(const cytnx_int64 &bond_idx, const cytnx_uint64 &dim);
1072 void truncate_(const std::string &label, const cytnx_uint64 &dim);
1073
1074 void from_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs, bool force, cytnx_double tol = 0.);
1075
1076 void group_basis_() {
1077 cytnx_warning_msg(true, "[WARNING] group basis will not have any effect on DensUniTensor.%s",
1078 "\n");
1079 }
1080
1081 void _save_dispatch(std::fstream &f) const;
1082 void _load_dispatch(std::fstream &f);
1083
1084 const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &get_qindices(const cytnx_uint64 &bidx) const {
1085 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] get_qindices can only be unsed on UniTensor with Symmetry.%s",
1086 "\n");
1087 }
1088 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &get_qindices(const cytnx_uint64 &bidx) {
1089 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] get_qindices can only be unsed on UniTensor with Symmetry.%s",
1090 "\n");
1091 }
1092
1093 const vec2d<cytnx_uint64> &get_itoi() const {
1094 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] get_itoi can only be unsed on UniTensor with Symmetry.%s",
1095 "\n");
1096 }
1097 vec2d<cytnx_uint64> &get_itoi() {
1098 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] get_itoi can only be unsed on UniTensor with Symmetry.%s",
1099 "\n");
1100 }
1101
1102 // end virtual function
1103 };
1105
1106 //======================================================================
1108 class BlockUniTensor : public UniTensor_base {
1109 protected:
1110 public:
1111 std::vector<std::vector<cytnx_uint64>>
1112 _inner_to_outer_idx; // stores the qindices for each block
1113 std::vector<Tensor> _blocks;
1114 Tensor NullRefTensor; // this returns when access block does not exists!
1115
1116 // given an index list [loc], get qnums from this->_bonds[loc] and return the combined qnums
1117 // calculated from Symm object! this assume 1. symmetry are the same for each bond!
1118 // 2. total_qns are feeded with size len(symmetry)
1119 void _fx_get_total_fluxs(std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &loc, const std::vector<Symmetry> &syms,
1120 std::vector<cytnx_int64> &total_qns) {
1121 memset(&total_qns[0], 0, sizeof(cytnx_int64) * total_qns.size());
1122
1123 for (cytnx_int32 i = 0; i < syms.size(); i++) {
1124 if (this->_bonds[0].type() == BD_BRA)
1125 total_qns[i] = syms[i].reverse_rule(this->_bonds[0]._impl->_qnums[loc[0]][i]);
1126 else
1127 total_qns[i] = this->_bonds[0]._impl->_qnums[loc[0]][i];
1128
1129 for (auto j = 1; j < loc.size(); j++) {
1130 if (this->_bonds[j].type() == BD_BRA)
1131 total_qns[i] = syms[i].combine_rule(
1132 total_qns[i], syms[i].reverse_rule(this->_bonds[j]._impl->_qnums[loc[j]][i]));
1133 else {
1134 total_qns[i] =
1135 syms[i].combine_rule(total_qns[i], this->_bonds[j]._impl->_qnums[loc[j]][i]);
1136 }
1137 }
1138 }
1139 }
1140
1141 void _fx_locate_elem(cytnx_int64 &bidx, std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &loc_in_T,
1142 const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const;
1143
1144 // internal function, grouping all duplicate qnums in all bonds
1145 void _fx_group_duplicates(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &dup_bond_idxs,
1146 const std::vector<std::vector<cytnx_uint64>> &idx_mappers);
1147
1148 void set_meta(BlockUniTensor *tmp, const bool &inner, const bool &outer) const {
1149 // outer meta
1150 if (outer) {
1151 tmp->_bonds = vec_clone(this->_bonds);
1152 tmp->_labels = this->_labels;
1153 tmp->_is_braket_form = this->_is_braket_form;
1154 tmp->_rowrank = this->_rowrank;
1155 tmp->_name = this->_name;
1156 }
1157
1158 tmp->_is_diag = this->_is_diag;
1159
1160 // inner meta
1161 if (inner) {
1162 tmp->_inner_to_outer_idx = this->_inner_to_outer_idx;
1163 }
1164 }
1165
1166 boost::intrusive_ptr<BlockUniTensor> clone_meta(const bool &inner, const bool &outer) const {
1167 boost::intrusive_ptr<BlockUniTensor> tmp(new BlockUniTensor());
1168 this->set_meta(tmp.get(), inner, outer);
1169 return tmp;
1170 };
1171
1172 friend class UniTensor;
1173 BlockUniTensor() {
1174 this->uten_type_id = UTenType.Block;
1175 this->_is_tag = true;
1176 }
1177
1178 // virtual functions:
1179 // void Init(const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &in_labels = {},
1180 // const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
1181 // const int &device = Device.cpu, const bool &is_diag = false,
1182 // const bool &no_alloc = false);
1183
1184 void Init(const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
1185 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
1186 const int &device = Device.cpu, const bool &is_diag = false,
1187 const bool &no_alloc = false, const std::string &name = "");
1188
1189 void Init_by_Tensor(const Tensor &in_tensor, const bool &is_diag = false,
1190 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const std::string &name = "") {
1191 cytnx_error_msg(
1192 true, "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] Cannot use Init_by_tensor() on a BlockUniTensor.%s", "\n");
1193 }
1194
1195 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> shape() const {
1196 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> out(this->_bonds.size());
1197 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < out.size(); i++) {
1198 out[i] = this->_bonds[i].dim();
1199 }
1200 return out;
1201 }
1202
1203 bool is_blockform() const { return true; }
1204 bool is_contiguous() const {
1205 bool out = true;
1206 for (int i = 0; i < this->_blocks.size(); i++) {
1207 out &= this->_blocks[i].is_contiguous();
1208 }
1209 return out;
1210 };
1211
1212 cytnx_uint64 Nblocks() const { return this->_blocks.size(); };
1213
1214 void to_(const int &device) {
1215 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_blocks.size(); i++) {
1216 this->_blocks[i].to_(device);
1217 }
1218 };
1219
1220 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> to(const int &device) {
1221 if (this->device() == device) {
1222 return this;
1223 } else {
1224 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
1225 out->to_(device);
1226 return out;
1227 }
1228 };
1229
1230 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> clone() const {
1231 boost::intrusive_ptr<BlockUniTensor> tmp = this->clone_meta(true, true);
1232 tmp->_blocks = vec_clone(this->_blocks);
1233 return tmp;
1234 };
1235
1236 unsigned int dtype() const {
1237 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1238 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
1239 cytnx_error_msg(this->_blocks.size() == 0, "[ERROR][internal] empty blocks for blockform.%s",
1240 "\n");
1241 #endif
1242 return this->_blocks.size() < 1 ? Type.Void : this->_blocks[0].dtype();
1243 };
1244 int device() const {
1245 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1246 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
1247 cytnx_error_msg(this->_blocks.size() == 0, "[ERROR][internal] empty blocks for blockform.%s",
1248 "\n");
1249 #endif
1250 return this->_blocks.size() < 1 ? -404 : this->_blocks[0].device();
1251 };
1252 std::string dtype_str() const {
1253 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1254 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
1255 cytnx_error_msg(this->_blocks.size() == 0, "[ERROR][internal] empty blocks for blockform.%s",
1256 "\n");
1257 #endif
1258 return this->_blocks.size() < 1 ? "Void, no valid blocks" : this->_blocks[0].dtype_str();
1259 };
1260 std::string device_str() const {
1261 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1262 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
1263 cytnx_error_msg(this->_blocks.size() == 0, "[ERROR][internal] empty blocks for blockform.%s",
1264 "\n");
1265 #endif
1266 return this->_blocks.size() < 1 ? "None, no valid blocks" : this->_blocks[0].device_str();
1267 };
1268
1269 Tensor get_block(const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) const {
1270 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(), "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] index out of range%s",
1271 "\n");
1272 return this->_blocks[idx].clone();
1273 };
1274
1275 // this one for Block will return the indicies!!
1276 Tensor get_block(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices, const bool &force_return) const {
1277 cytnx_error_msg(indices.size() != this->rank(),
1278 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
1279 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
1280 "\n");
1281
1282 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
1283
1284 // find if the indices specify exists!
1285 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
1286 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
1287 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
1288 b = i;
1289 break;
1290 }
1291 }
1292
1293 if (b < 0) {
1294 if (force_return) {
1295 return NullRefTensor;
1296 } else {
1297 cytnx_error_msg(true,
1298 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockUniTensor] no avaliable block exists, "
1299 "force_return=false, so "
1300 "error throws. \n If you want to return an empty block without "
1301 "error when block is "
1302 "not avaliable, set force_return=True.%s",
1303 "\n");
1304 }
1305 } else {
1306 return this->_blocks[b].clone();
1307 }
1308 }
1309
1310 const Tensor &get_block_(const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) const {
1311 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(), "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] index out of range%s",
1312 "\n");
1313 return this->_blocks[idx];
1314 };
1315
1316 Tensor &get_block_(const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) {
1317 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(), "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] index out of range%s",
1318 "\n");
1319 return this->_blocks[idx];
1320 };
1321
1322 const Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices,
1323 const bool &force_return) const {
1324 cytnx_error_msg(indices.size() != this->rank(),
1325 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
1326 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
1327 "\n");
1328
1329 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
1330
1331 // find if the indices specify exists!
1332 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
1333 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
1334 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
1335 b = i;
1336 break;
1337 }
1338 }
1339
1340 if (b < 0) {
1341 if (force_return) {
1342 return this->NullRefTensor;
1343 } else {
1344 cytnx_error_msg(true,
1345 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockUniTensor] no avaliable block exists, "
1346 "force_return=false, so "
1347 "error throws. \n If you want to return an empty block without "
1348 "error when block is "
1349 "not avaliable, set force_return=True.%s",
1350 "\n");
1351 }
1352 } else {
1353 return this->_blocks[b];
1354 }
1355 }
1356
1357 Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices, const bool &force_return) {
1358 cytnx_error_msg(indices.size() != this->rank(),
1359 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
1360 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
1361 "\n");
1362
1363 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
1364
1365 // find if the indices specify exists!
1366 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
1367 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
1368 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
1369 b = i;
1370 break;
1371 }
1372 }
1373
1374 if (b < 0) {
1375 if (force_return) {
1376 return this->NullRefTensor;
1377 } else {
1378 cytnx_error_msg(true,
1379 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockUniTensor] no avaliable block exists, "
1380 "force_return=false, so "
1381 "error throws. \n If you want to return an empty block without "
1382 "error when block is "
1383 "not avaliable, set force_return=True.%s",
1384 "\n");
1385 }
1386 } else {
1387 return this->_blocks[b];
1388 }
1389 }
1390
1391 std::vector<Tensor> get_blocks() const { return vec_clone(this->_blocks); }
1392 const std::vector<Tensor> &get_blocks_(const bool &) const { return this->_blocks; }
1393 std::vector<Tensor> &get_blocks_(const bool &) { return this->_blocks; }
1394
1395 bool same_data(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs) const {
1396 if (rhs->uten_type() != UTenType.Block) return false;
1397 if (rhs->get_blocks_(1).size() != this->get_blocks_(1).size()) return false;
1398
1399 for (int i = 0; i < rhs->get_blocks_(1).size(); i++)
1400 if (this->get_blocks_(1)[i].same_data(rhs->get_blocks_(1)[i]) == false) return false;
1401
1402 return true;
1403 }
1404
1405 void set_rowrank_(const cytnx_uint64 &new_rowrank) {
1406 cytnx_error_msg(new_rowrank > this->rank(),
1407 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] rowrank should be [>=0] and [<=UniTensor.rank].%s",
1408 "\n");
1409 if (this->is_diag()) {
1410 cytnx_error_msg(new_rowrank != 1,
1411 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] rowrank should be [==1] when is_diag =true!.%s",
1412 "\n");
1413 }
1414 this->_rowrank = new_rowrank;
1415 this->_is_braket_form = this->_update_braket();
1416 }
1417
1418 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> set_rowrank(const cytnx_uint64 &new_rowrank) const {
1419 boost::intrusive_ptr<BlockUniTensor> tmp = this->clone_meta(true, true);
1420 tmp->_blocks = this->_blocks;
1421 tmp->set_rowrank_(new_rowrank);
1422 return tmp;
1423 }
1424
1425 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> permute(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper,
1426 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
1427 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> permute(const std::vector<std::string> &mapper,
1428 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
1429
1430 void permute_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
1431 void permute_(const std::vector<std::string> &mapper, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
1432
1433 void twist_(const cytnx_int64 &idx) override {
1434 // do nothing for bosonic UniTensor
1435 return;
1436 }
1437 void fermion_twists_() override {
1438 // do nothing for bosonic UniTensor
1439 return;
1440 }
1441 void twist_(const std::string &label) override {
1442 // do nothing for bosonic UniTensor
1443 return;
1444 }
1445
1446 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> contiguous_() {
1447 // Rebind each block to the non-mutating Tensor::contiguous() result instead of calling
1448 // contiguous_() in place, so a block Tensor shared with another UniTensor (e.g. via
1449 // relabel()) is not corrupted (#724). Tensor::contiguous() is cheap when the block is
1450 // already contiguous (no data copy; same impl returned).
1451 for (unsigned int b = 0; b < this->_blocks.size(); b++)
1452 this->_blocks[b] = this->_blocks[b].contiguous();
1453 return boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(this);
1454 }
1455 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> contiguous();
1456
1457 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> apply_() {
1458 return boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(this);
1459 }
1460 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> apply() {
1461 // just return self
1462 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(this);
1463 return out;
1464 }
1465
1466 void print_diagram(const bool &bond_info = false) const;
1467 void print_blocks(const bool &full_info = true) const;
1468 void print_block(const cytnx_int64 &idx, const bool &full_info = true) const;
1469
1470 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> contract(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs,
1471 const bool &mv_elem_self = false,
1472 const bool &mv_elem_rhs = false);
1473
1474 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
1475 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabels(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
1476
1477 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const std::vector<std::string> &old_labels,
1478 const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
1479 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabels(const std::vector<std::string> &old_labels,
1480 const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
1481
1482 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const std::string &old_label,
1483 const std::string &new_label);
1484 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const cytnx_int64 &inx,
1485 const std::string &new_label);
1486
1487 std::vector<Symmetry> syms() const;
1488
1489 void reshape_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &new_shape, const cytnx_uint64 &rowrank = 0) {
1490 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] Cannot reshape a UniTensor with symmetry.%s", "\n");
1491 }
1492 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> reshape(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &new_shape,
1493 const cytnx_uint64 &rowrank = 0) {
1494 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] Cannot reshape a UniTensor with symmetry.%s", "\n");
1495 return nullptr;
1496 }
1497
1498 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> to_dense();
1499 void to_dense_();
1500
1501 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> astype(const unsigned int &dtype) const {
1502 boost::intrusive_ptr<BlockUniTensor> tmp = this->clone_meta(true, true);
1503 tmp->_blocks.resize(this->_blocks.size());
1504 for (cytnx_int64 blk = 0; blk < this->_blocks.size(); blk++) {
1505 tmp->_blocks[blk] = this->_blocks[blk].astype(dtype);
1506 }
1507 return tmp;
1508 };
1509
1510 // this will only work on non-symm tensor (DenseUniTensor)
1511 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> get(const std::vector<Accessor> &accessors) {
1512 cytnx_error_msg(
1513 true,
1514 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor][get] Cannot use get on a UniTensor with "
1515 "Symmetry.\n suggestion: try get_block/get_block_/get_blocks/get_blocks_ first.%s",
1516 "\n");
1517 return nullptr;
1518 }
1519
1520 // this will only work on non-symm tensor (DenseUniTensor)
1521 void set(const std::vector<Accessor> &accessors, const Tensor &rhs) {
1522 cytnx_error_msg(
1523 true,
1524 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor][get] Cannot use get on a UniTensor with "
1525 "Symmetry.\n suggestion: try get_block/get_block_/get_blocks/get_blocks_ first.%s",
1526 "\n");
1527 }
1528
1529 void put_block(const Tensor &in, const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) {
1530 cytnx_error_msg(in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
1531 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not match.%s",
1532 "\n");
1533 cytnx_error_msg(in.device() != this->device(),
1534 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
1535 "match.%s",
1536 "\n");
1537 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
1538 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
1539 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(), "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] index out of range%s",
1540 "\n");
1541 cytnx_error_msg(in.shape() != this->_blocks[idx].shape(),
1542 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] the shape of input tensor does not match the shape "
1543 "of block @ idx=%d\n",
1544 idx);
1545
1546 this->_blocks[idx] = in.clone();
1547 }
1548 void put_block_(Tensor &in, const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) {
1549 cytnx_error_msg(in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
1550 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not match.%s",
1551 "\n");
1552 cytnx_error_msg(in.device() != this->device(),
1553 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
1554 "match.%s",
1555 "\n");
1556 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
1557 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
1558 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(), "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] index out of range%s",
1559 "\n");
1560 cytnx_error_msg(in.shape() != this->_blocks[idx].shape(),
1561 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] the shape of input tensor does not match the shape "
1562 "of block @ idx=%d\n",
1563 idx);
1564
1565 this->_blocks[idx] = in;
1566 }
1567 void put_block(const Tensor &in, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices) {
1568 cytnx_error_msg(in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
1569 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not match.%s",
1570 "\n");
1571 cytnx_error_msg(in.device() != this->device(),
1572 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
1573 "match.%s",
1574 "\n");
1575 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
1576 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
1577 cytnx_error_msg(indices.size() != this->rank(),
1578 "[ERROR][put_block][BlockUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
1579 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
1580 "\n");
1581
1582 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
1583
1584 // find if the indices specify exists!
1585 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
1586 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
1587 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
1588 b = i;
1589 break;
1590 }
1591 }
1592
1593 if (b < 0) {
1594 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR][put_block][BlockUniTensor] no avaliable block exists.%s",
1595 "\n");
1596 } else {
1597 cytnx_error_msg(
1598 in.shape() != this->_blocks[b].shape(),
1599 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] the shape of input tensor does not match the shape "
1600 "of block @ idx=%d\n",
1601 b);
1602
1603 this->_blocks[b] = in.clone();
1604 }
1605 }
1606 void put_block_(Tensor &in, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices) {
1607 cytnx_error_msg(in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
1608 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not match.%s",
1609 "\n");
1610 cytnx_error_msg(in.device() != this->device(),
1611 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
1612 "match.%s",
1613 "\n");
1614 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
1615 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
1616 cytnx_error_msg(indices.size() != this->rank(),
1617 "[ERROR][put_block][BlockUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
1618 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
1619 "\n");
1620
1621 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
1622
1623 // find if the indices specify exists!
1624 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
1625 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
1626 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
1627 b = i;
1628 break;
1629 }
1630 }
1631
1632 if (b < 0) {
1633 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR][put_block][BlockUniTensor] no avaliable block exists.%s",
1634 "\n");
1635 } else {
1636 cytnx_error_msg(
1637 in.shape() != this->_blocks[b].shape(),
1638 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] the shape of input tensor does not match the shape "
1639 "of block @ idx=%d\n",
1640 b);
1641 this->_blocks[b] = in;
1642 }
1643 }
1644
1645 void tag() {
1646 // no-use!
1647 }
1648
1649 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Conj() {
1650 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
1651 out->Conj_();
1652 return out;
1653 }
1654
1655 void Conj_() {
1656 for (int i = 0; i < this->_blocks.size(); i++) {
1657 this->_blocks[i].Conj_();
1658 }
1659 };
1660
1661 void Transpose_();
1662 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Transpose() {
1663 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
1664 out->Transpose_();
1665 return out;
1666 }
1667
1668 void normalize_();
1669 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> normalize() {
1670 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
1671 out->normalize_();
1672 return out;
1673 }
1674
1675 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Dagger() {
1676 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->Conj();
1677 out->Transpose_();
1678 return out;
1679 }
1680 void Dagger_() {
1681 this->Conj_();
1682 this->Transpose_();
1683 }
1684
1685 void Trace_(const std::string &a, const std::string &b);
1686 void Trace_(const cytnx_int64 &a, const cytnx_int64 &b);
1687
1688 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Trace(const std::string &a, const std::string &b) {
1689 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
1690 out->Trace_(a, b);
1691 if (out->rank() == 0) {
1692 DenseUniTensor *tmp = new DenseUniTensor();
1693 tmp->_block = ((BlockUniTensor *)out.get())->_blocks[0];
1694 out = boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(tmp);
1695 }
1696 return out;
1697 }
1698 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Trace(const cytnx_int64 &a, const cytnx_int64 &b) {
1699 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
1700 out->Trace_(a, b);
1701 if (out->rank() == 0) {
1702 DenseUniTensor *tmp = new DenseUniTensor();
1703 tmp->_block = ((BlockUniTensor *)out.get())->_blocks[0];
1704 out = boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(tmp);
1705 }
1706 return out;
1707 }
1708
1709 Tensor Norm() const;
1710
1711 bool elem_exists(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const;
1712
1713 const Scalar::Sproxy at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const;
1714 const cytnx_complex128 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1715 const cytnx_complex128 &aux) const;
1716 const cytnx_complex64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1717 const cytnx_complex64 &aux) const;
1718 const cytnx_double &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1719 const cytnx_double &aux) const;
1720 const cytnx_float &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1721 const cytnx_float &aux) const;
1722 const cytnx_uint64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1723 const cytnx_uint64 &aux) const;
1724 const cytnx_int64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1725 const cytnx_int64 &aux) const;
1726 const cytnx_uint32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1727 const cytnx_uint32 &aux) const;
1728 const cytnx_int32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1729 const cytnx_int32 &aux) const;
1730 const cytnx_uint16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1731 const cytnx_uint16 &aux) const;
1732 const cytnx_int16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1733 const cytnx_int16 &aux) const;
1734
1735 Scalar::Sproxy at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator);
1736 cytnx_complex128 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1737 const cytnx_complex128 &aux);
1738 cytnx_complex64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1739 const cytnx_complex64 &aux);
1740 cytnx_double &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_double &aux);
1741 cytnx_float &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_float &aux);
1742 cytnx_uint64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_uint64 &aux);
1743 cytnx_int64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_int64 &aux);
1744 cytnx_uint32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_uint32 &aux);
1745 cytnx_int32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_int32 &aux);
1746 cytnx_uint16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_uint16 &aux);
1747 cytnx_int16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_int16 &aux);
1748
1749 void _save_dispatch(std::fstream &f) const;
1750 void _load_dispatch(std::fstream &f);
1751
1752 // this will remove the [q_index]-th qnum at [bond_idx]-th Bond!
1753 void truncate_(const std::string &label, const cytnx_uint64 &q_index);
1754 void truncate_(const cytnx_int64 &bond_idx, const cytnx_uint64 &q_index);
1755
1756 void Add_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
1757 void Add_(const Scalar &rhs) {
1758 cytnx_error_msg(
1759 true,
1760 "[ERROR] Cannot perform elementwise arithmetic '+' between Scalar and BlockUniTensor.\n %s "
1761 "\n",
1762 "This operation would destroy the block structure. [Suggest] Avoid or use get/put_block(s) "
1763 "to do operation on blocks.");
1764 }
1765
1766 void Mul_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
1767 void Mul_(const Scalar &rhs);
1768
1769 void Sub_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
1770 void Sub_(const Scalar &rhs) {
1771 cytnx_error_msg(
1772 true,
1773 "[ERROR] Cannot perform elementwise arithmetic '-' between Scalar and BlockUniTensor.\n %s "
1774 "\n",
1775 "This operation would destroy the block structure. [Suggest] Avoid or use get/put_block(s) "
1776 "to do operation on blocks.");
1777 }
1778 void lSub_(const Scalar &lhs) {
1779 cytnx_error_msg(
1780 true,
1781 "[ERROR] Cannot perform elementwise arithmetic '-' between Scalar and BlockUniTensor.\n %s "
1782 "\n",
1783 "This operation would destroy the block structure. [Suggest] Avoid or use get/put_block(s) "
1784 "to do operation on blocks.");
1785 }
1786
1787 void Div_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
1788 void Div_(const Scalar &rhs);
1789 void lDiv_(const Scalar &lhs) {
1790 cytnx_error_msg(
1791 true,
1792 "[ERROR] Cannot perform elementwise arithmetic '/' between Scalar and BlockUniTensor.\n %s "
1793 "\n",
1794 "This operation would cause division by zero on non-block elements. [Suggest] Avoid or use "
1795 "get/put_block(s) to do operation on blocks.");
1796 }
1797 void from_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs, bool force, cytnx_double tol = 0.);
1798
1799 void group_basis_();
1800
1801 void combineBond(const std::vector<std::string> &indicators, const bool &force = false);
1802 void combineBonds(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indicators, const bool &force = false);
1803 void combineBonds(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indicators, const bool &force,
1804 const bool &by_label);
1805 void combineBonds(const std::vector<std::string> &indicators, const bool &force = false);
1806
1807 const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &get_qindices(const cytnx_uint64 &bidx) const {
1808 cytnx_error_msg(
1809 bidx >= this->Nblocks(),
1810 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] bidx out of bound! only %d blocks in current UTen.\n",
1811 this->Nblocks());
1812 return this->_inner_to_outer_idx[bidx];
1813 }
1814 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &get_qindices(const cytnx_uint64 &bidx) {
1815 cytnx_error_msg(
1816 bidx >= this->Nblocks(),
1817 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] bidx out of bound! only %d blocks in current UTen.\n",
1818 this->Nblocks());
1819 return this->_inner_to_outer_idx[bidx];
1820 }
1821
1822 const vec2d<cytnx_uint64> &get_itoi() const { return this->_inner_to_outer_idx; }
1823 vec2d<cytnx_uint64> &get_itoi() { return this->_inner_to_outer_idx; }
1824 };
1826
1827 //======================================================================
1829 class BlockFermionicUniTensor : public UniTensor_base {
1830 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor; additionally sign flips are stored as
1831 //_signflip and taken care of in all the methods
1832 public:
1833 std::vector<std::vector<cytnx_uint64>>
1834 _inner_to_outer_idx; // stores the qindices for each block
1835 std::vector<Tensor> _blocks;
1836 Tensor NullRefTensor; // this returns when accessed block does not exists!
1837 // additional informaiton for fermions:
1838 std::vector<cytnx_bool>
1839 _signflip; // if true, the sign of the corresponding block needs to be flipped
1840
1841 // given an index list [loc], get qnums from this->_bonds[loc] and return the combined qnums
1842 // calculated from Symm object! this assume 1. symmetry are the same for each bond!
1843 // 2. total_qns are feeded with size len(symmetry)
1844 void _fx_get_total_fluxs(std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &loc, const std::vector<Symmetry> &syms,
1845 std::vector<cytnx_int64> &total_qns) {
1846 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1847 memset(&total_qns[0], 0, sizeof(cytnx_int64) * total_qns.size());
1848
1849 for (cytnx_int32 i = 0; i < syms.size(); i++) {
1850 if (this->_bonds[0].type() == BD_BRA)
1851 total_qns[i] = syms[i].reverse_rule(this->_bonds[0]._impl->_qnums[loc[0]][i]);
1852 else
1853 total_qns[i] = this->_bonds[0]._impl->_qnums[loc[0]][i];
1854
1855 for (auto j = 1; j < loc.size(); j++) {
1856 if (this->_bonds[j].type() == BD_BRA)
1857 total_qns[i] = syms[i].combine_rule(
1858 total_qns[i], syms[i].reverse_rule(this->_bonds[j]._impl->_qnums[loc[j]][i]));
1859 else {
1860 total_qns[i] =
1861 syms[i].combine_rule(total_qns[i], this->_bonds[j]._impl->_qnums[loc[j]][i]);
1862 }
1863 }
1864 }
1865 }
1866
1867 void _fx_locate_elem(cytnx_int64 &bidx, std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &loc_in_T,
1868 const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const;
1869
1870 // internal function, grouping all duplicate qnums in all bonds
1871 void _fx_group_duplicates(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &dup_bond_idxs,
1872 const std::vector<std::vector<cytnx_uint64>> &idx_mappers);
1873
1874 void set_meta(BlockFermionicUniTensor *tmp, const bool &inner, const bool &outer) const {
1875 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor; additionally, _signflip is set
1876 // outer meta
1877 if (outer) {
1878 tmp->_bonds = vec_clone(this->_bonds);
1879 tmp->_labels = this->_labels;
1880 tmp->_is_braket_form = this->_is_braket_form;
1881 tmp->_rowrank = this->_rowrank;
1882 tmp->_name = this->_name;
1883 // tmp->_signflip = vec_clone(this->_signflip);
1884 tmp->_signflip = this->_signflip;
1885 }
1886
1887 tmp->_is_diag = this->_is_diag;
1888
1889 // inner meta
1890 if (inner) {
1891 tmp->_inner_to_outer_idx = this->_inner_to_outer_idx;
1892 }
1893 }
1894
1895 boost::intrusive_ptr<BlockFermionicUniTensor> clone_meta(const bool &inner,
1896 const bool &outer) const {
1897 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1898 boost::intrusive_ptr<BlockFermionicUniTensor> tmp(new BlockFermionicUniTensor());
1899 this->set_meta(tmp.get(), inner, outer);
1900 return tmp;
1901 };
1902
1903 friend class UniTensor;
1904 BlockFermionicUniTensor() {
1905 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1906 this->uten_type_id = UTenType.BlockFermionic;
1907 this->_is_tag = true;
1908 }
1909
1910 void Init(const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
1911 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
1912 const int &device = Device.cpu, const bool &is_diag = false,
1913 const bool &no_alloc = false, const std::string &name = "");
1914
1915 void Init_by_Tensor(const Tensor &in_tensor, const bool &is_diag = false,
1916 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const std::string &name = "") {
1917 cytnx_error_msg(true,
1918 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] Cannot use Init_by_tensor() on a "
1919 "BlockFermionicUniTensor.%s",
1920 "\n");
1921 }
1922
1923 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> shape() const {
1924 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1925 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> out(this->_bonds.size());
1926 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < out.size(); i++) {
1927 out[i] = this->_bonds[i].dim();
1928 }
1929 return out;
1930 }
1931
1932 bool is_blockform() const {
1933 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1934 return true;
1935 }
1936
1937 bool is_contiguous() const {
1938 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1939 bool out = true;
1940 for (int i = 0; i < this->_blocks.size(); i++) {
1941 out &= this->_blocks[i].is_contiguous();
1942 }
1943 return out;
1944 };
1945
1946 cytnx_uint64 Nblocks() const {
1947 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1948 return this->_blocks.size();
1949 };
1950
1951 std::vector<bool> signflip() const override { return this->_signflip; };
1952 std::vector<bool> &signflip_() override { return this->_signflip; };
1953
1954 void to_(const int &device) {
1955 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1956 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_blocks.size(); i++) {
1957 this->_blocks[i].to_(device);
1958 }
1959 };
1960
1961 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> to(const int &device) {
1962 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1963 if (this->device() == device) {
1964 return this;
1965 } else {
1966 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
1967 out->to_(device);
1968 return out;
1969 }
1970 };
1971
1972 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> clone() const {
1973 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor; changed to BlockFermionicUniTensor as
1974 // output
1975 boost::intrusive_ptr<BlockFermionicUniTensor> tmp = this->clone_meta(true, true);
1976 tmp->_blocks = vec_clone(this->_blocks);
1977 return tmp;
1978 };
1979
1980 unsigned int dtype() const {
1981 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1982 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
1983 cytnx_error_msg(this->_blocks.size() == 0, "[ERROR][internal] empty blocks for blockform.%s",
1984 "\n");
1985 #endif
1986 return this->_blocks.size() < 1 ? Type.Void : this->_blocks[0].dtype();
1987 };
1988 int device() const {
1989 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1990 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
1991 cytnx_error_msg(this->_blocks.size() == 0, "[ERROR][internal] empty blocks for blockform.%s",
1992 "\n");
1993 #endif
1994 return this->_blocks.size() < 1 ? -404 : this->_blocks[0].device();
1995 };
1996 std::string dtype_str() const {
1997 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1998 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
1999 cytnx_error_msg(this->_blocks.size() == 0, "[ERROR][internal] empty blocks for blockform.%s",
2000 "\n");
2001 #endif
2002 return this->_blocks.size() < 1 ? "Void, no valid blocks" : this->_blocks[0].dtype_str();
2003 };
2004 std::string device_str() const {
2005 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2006 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
2007 cytnx_error_msg(this->_blocks.size() == 0, "[ERROR][internal] empty blocks for blockform.%s",
2008 "\n");
2009 #endif
2010 return this->_blocks.size() < 1 ? "None, no valid blocks" : this->_blocks[0].device_str();
2011 };
2012
2013 Tensor get_block(const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) const {
2014 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2015 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(),
2016 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] index out of range%s", "\n");
2017 return this->_blocks[idx].clone();
2018 };
2019
2020 // this one for Block will return the indicies!!
2021 Tensor get_block(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices, const bool &force_return) const {
2022 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2023 cytnx_error_msg(
2024 indices.size() != this->rank(),
2025 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
2026 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
2027 "\n");
2028
2029 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
2030
2031 // find if the indices specify exists!
2032 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
2033 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
2034 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
2035 b = i;
2036 break;
2037 }
2038 }
2039
2040 if (b < 0) {
2041 if (force_return) {
2042 return NullRefTensor;
2043 } else {
2044 cytnx_error_msg(true,
2045 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] no avaliable block exists, "
2046 "force_return=false, so "
2047 "error throws. \n If you want to return an empty block without "
2048 "error when block is "
2049 "not avaliable, set force_return=True.%s",
2050 "\n");
2051 }
2052 } else {
2053 return this->_blocks[b].clone();
2054 }
2055 }
2056
2057 const Tensor &get_block_(const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) const {
2058 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2059 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(),
2060 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] index out of range%s", "\n");
2061 return this->_blocks[idx];
2062 };
2063
2064 Tensor &get_block_(const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) {
2065 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2066 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(),
2067 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] index out of range%s", "\n");
2068 return this->_blocks[idx];
2069 };
2070
2071 const Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices,
2072 const bool &force_return) const {
2073 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2074 cytnx_error_msg(
2075 indices.size() != this->rank(),
2076 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
2077 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
2078 "\n");
2079
2080 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
2081
2082 // find if the indices specify exists!
2083 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
2084 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
2085 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
2086 b = i;
2087 break;
2088 }
2089 }
2090
2091 if (b < 0) {
2092 if (force_return) {
2093 return this->NullRefTensor;
2094 } else {
2095 cytnx_error_msg(true,
2096 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] no avaliable block exists, "
2097 "force_return=false, so "
2098 "error throws. \n If you want to return an empty block without "
2099 "error when block is "
2100 "not avaliable, set force_return=True.%s",
2101 "\n");
2102 }
2103 } else {
2104 return this->_blocks[b];
2105 }
2106 }
2107
2108 Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices, const bool &force_return) {
2109 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2110 cytnx_error_msg(
2111 indices.size() != this->rank(),
2112 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
2113 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
2114 "\n");
2115
2116 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
2117
2118 // find if the indices specify exists!
2119 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
2120 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
2121 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
2122 b = i;
2123 break;
2124 }
2125 }
2126
2127 if (b < 0) {
2128 if (force_return) {
2129 return this->NullRefTensor;
2130 } else {
2131 cytnx_error_msg(true,
2132 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] no avaliable block exists, "
2133 "force_return=false, so "
2134 "error throws. \n If you want to return an empty block without "
2135 "error when block is "
2136 "not avaliable, set force_return=True.%s",
2137 "\n");
2138 }
2139 } else {
2140 return this->_blocks[b];
2141 }
2142 }
2143
2144 std::vector<Tensor> get_blocks() const {
2145 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2146 return vec_clone(this->_blocks);
2147 }
2148 const std::vector<Tensor> &get_blocks_(const bool &) const {
2149 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2150 return this->_blocks;
2151 }
2152 std::vector<Tensor> &get_blocks_(const bool &) {
2153 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2154 return this->_blocks;
2155 }
2156
2157 bool same_data(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs) const {
2158 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor; changed to BlockFermionic UTenType
2159 if (rhs->uten_type() != UTenType.BlockFermionic) return false;
2160 if (rhs->get_blocks_(1).size() != this->get_blocks_(1).size()) return false;
2161
2162 for (int i = 0; i < rhs->get_blocks_(1).size(); i++)
2163 if (this->get_blocks_(1)[i].same_data(rhs->get_blocks_(1)[i]) == false) return false;
2164
2165 return true;
2166 }
2167
2168 void set_rowrank_(const cytnx_uint64 &new_rowrank) {
2169 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2170 cytnx_error_msg(
2171 new_rowrank > this->rank(),
2172 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] rowrank should be [>=0] and [<=UniTensor.rank].%s", "\n");
2173 if (this->is_diag()) {
2174 cytnx_error_msg(
2175 new_rowrank != 1,
2176 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] rowrank should be [==1] when is_diag =true!.%s", "\n");
2177 }
2178 this->_rowrank = new_rowrank;
2179 this->_is_braket_form = this->_update_braket();
2180 }
2181
2182 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> set_rowrank(const cytnx_uint64 &new_rowrank) const {
2183 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor; output type changed to
2184 // BlockFermionicUniTensor
2185 boost::intrusive_ptr<BlockFermionicUniTensor> tmp = this->clone_meta(true, true);
2186 tmp->_blocks = this->_blocks;
2187 tmp->set_rowrank_(new_rowrank);
2188 return tmp;
2189 }
2190
2191 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> permute(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper,
2192 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
2193 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> permute(const std::vector<std::string> &mapper,
2194 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
2195
2196 void permute_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1) override;
2197 void permute_(const std::vector<std::string> &mapper, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1) override;
2198
2199 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> permute_nosignflip(
2200 const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1) override;
2201 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> permute_nosignflip(
2202 const std::vector<std::string> &mapper, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1) override;
2203 void permute_nosignflip_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper,
2204 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1) override;
2205 void permute_nosignflip_(const std::vector<std::string> &mapper,
2206 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1) override;
2207
2208 void twist_(const cytnx_int64 &idx) override;
2209 void twist_(const std::string &label) override;
2210 void fermion_twists_() override;
2211
2212 // Helper function; implements the sign flips when permuting indices
2213 std::vector<bool> _swapsigns_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper) const;
2214 std::vector<bool> _lhssigns_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper,
2215 const cytnx_int64 contrno) const;
2216 std::vector<bool> _swapsigns_(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &mapper) const;
2217 std::vector<bool> _lhssigns_(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &mapper,
2218 const cytnx_uint64 contrno) const;
2219
2220 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> contiguous_() {
2221 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2222 // Rebind each block to the non-mutating Tensor::contiguous() result instead of calling
2223 // contiguous_() in place, so a block Tensor shared with another UniTensor (e.g. via
2224 // relabel()) is not corrupted (#724).
2225 for (unsigned int b = 0; b < this->_blocks.size(); b++)
2226 this->_blocks[b] = this->_blocks[b].contiguous();
2227 return boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(this);
2228 }
2229 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> contiguous();
2230
2231 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> apply_();
2232 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> apply();
2233
2234 void print_diagram(const bool &bond_info = false) const;
2235 void print_blocks(const bool &full_info = true) const;
2236 void print_block(const cytnx_int64 &idx, const bool &full_info = true) const;
2237
2238 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> contract(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs,
2239 const bool &mv_elem_self = false,
2240 const bool &mv_elem_rhs = false);
2241
2242 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
2243 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabels(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
2244
2245 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const std::vector<std::string> &old_labels,
2246 const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
2247 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabels(const std::vector<std::string> &old_labels,
2248 const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
2249
2250 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const std::string &old_label,
2251 const std::string &new_label);
2252 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const cytnx_int64 &inx,
2253 const std::string &new_label);
2254 std::vector<Symmetry> syms() const;
2255
2256 void reshape_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &new_shape, const cytnx_uint64 &rowrank = 0) {
2257 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] Cannot reshape a UniTensor with symmetry.%s", "\n");
2258 }
2259 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> reshape(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &new_shape,
2260 const cytnx_uint64 &rowrank = 0) {
2261 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] Cannot reshape a UniTensor with symmetry.%s", "\n");
2262 return nullptr;
2263 }
2264
2265 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> to_dense();
2266 void to_dense_();
2267
2268 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> astype(const unsigned int &dtype) const {
2269 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor; the tensor type was adapted
2270 boost::intrusive_ptr<BlockFermionicUniTensor> tmp = this->clone_meta(true, true);
2271 tmp->_blocks.resize(this->_blocks.size());
2272 for (cytnx_int64 blk = 0; blk < this->_blocks.size(); blk++) {
2273 tmp->_blocks[blk] = this->_blocks[blk].astype(dtype);
2274 }
2275 return tmp;
2276 };
2277
2278 // this will only work on non-symm tensor (DenseUniTensor)
2279 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> get(const std::vector<Accessor> &accessors) {
2280 cytnx_error_msg(
2281 true,
2282 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor][get] Cannot use get on a UniTensor with "
2283 "Symmetry.\n suggestion: try get_block/get_block_/get_blocks/get_blocks_ first.%s",
2284 "\n");
2285 return nullptr;
2286 }
2287
2288 // this will only work on non-symm tensor (DenseUniTensor)
2289 void set(const std::vector<Accessor> &accessors, const Tensor &rhs) {
2290 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2291 cytnx_error_msg(
2292 true,
2293 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor][get] Cannot use get on a UniTensor with "
2294 "Symmetry.\n suggestion: try get_block/get_block_/get_blocks/get_blocks_ first.%s",
2295 "\n");
2296 }
2297
2298 void put_block(const Tensor &in, const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) {
2299 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2300 cytnx_error_msg(
2301 in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
2302 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not match.%s",
2303 "\n");
2304 cytnx_error_msg(
2305 in.device() != this->device(),
2306 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
2307 "match.%s",
2308 "\n");
2309 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
2310 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
2311 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(),
2312 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] index out of range%s", "\n");
2313 cytnx_error_msg(
2314 in.shape() != this->_blocks[idx].shape(),
2315 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] the shape of input tensor does not match the shape "
2316 "of block @ idx=%d\n",
2317 idx);
2318
2319 this->_blocks[idx] = in.clone();
2320 }
2321 void put_block_(Tensor &in, const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) {
2322 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2323 cytnx_error_msg(
2324 in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
2325 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not match.%s",
2326 "\n");
2327 cytnx_error_msg(
2328 in.device() != this->device(),
2329 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
2330 "match.%s",
2331 "\n");
2332 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
2333 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
2334 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(),
2335 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] index out of range%s", "\n");
2336 cytnx_error_msg(
2337 in.shape() != this->_blocks[idx].shape(),
2338 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] the shape of input tensor does not match the shape "
2339 "of block @ idx=%d\n",
2340 idx);
2341
2342 this->_blocks[idx] = in;
2343 }
2344 void put_block(const Tensor &in, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices) {
2345 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2346 cytnx_error_msg(
2347 in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
2348 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not match.%s",
2349 "\n");
2350 cytnx_error_msg(
2351 in.device() != this->device(),
2352 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
2353 "match.%s",
2354 "\n");
2355 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
2356 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
2357 cytnx_error_msg(
2358 indices.size() != this->rank(),
2359 "[ERROR][put_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
2360 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
2361 "\n");
2362
2363 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
2364
2365 // find if the indices specify exists!
2366 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
2367 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
2368 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
2369 b = i;
2370 break;
2371 }
2372 }
2373
2374 if (b < 0) {
2375 cytnx_error_msg(
2376 true, "[ERROR][put_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] no avaliable block exists.%s", "\n");
2377 } else {
2378 cytnx_error_msg(
2379 in.shape() != this->_blocks[b].shape(),
2380 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] the shape of input tensor does not match the shape "
2381 "of block @ idx=%d\n",
2382 b);
2383
2384 this->_blocks[b] = in.clone();
2385 }
2386 }
2387 void put_block_(Tensor &in, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices) {
2388 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2389 cytnx_error_msg(
2390 in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
2391 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not match.%s",
2392 "\n");
2393 cytnx_error_msg(
2394 in.device() != this->device(),
2395 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
2396 "match.%s",
2397 "\n");
2398 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
2399 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
2400 cytnx_error_msg(
2401 indices.size() != this->rank(),
2402 "[ERROR][put_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
2403 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
2404 "\n");
2405
2406 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
2407
2408 // find if the indices specify exists!
2409 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
2410 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
2411 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
2412 b = i;
2413 break;
2414 }
2415 }
2416
2417 if (b < 0) {
2418 cytnx_error_msg(
2419 true, "[ERROR][put_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] no avaliable block exists.%s", "\n");
2420 } else {
2421 cytnx_error_msg(
2422 in.shape() != this->_blocks[b].shape(),
2423 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] the shape of input tensor does not match the shape "
2424 "of block @ idx=%d\n",
2425 b);
2426 this->_blocks[b] = in;
2427 }
2428 }
2429
2430 void tag() {
2431 // no-use!
2432 }
2433
2434 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Conj() {
2435 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2436 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
2437 out->Conj_();
2438 return out;
2439 }
2440
2441 void Conj_() {
2442 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2443 for (int i = 0; i < this->_blocks.size(); i++) {
2444 this->_blocks[i].Conj_();
2445 }
2446 };
2447
2448 // Transpose(_) changes the index order without sign flips and reverses the bond directions for
2449 // fermionic tensors
2450 void Transpose_();
2451 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Transpose() {
2452 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2453 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
2454 out->Transpose_();
2455 return out;
2456 }
2457
2458 void normalize_();
2459 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> normalize() {
2460 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2461 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
2462 out->normalize_();
2463 return out;
2464 }
2465
2466 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Dagger() {
2467 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2468 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->Conj();
2469 out->Transpose_();
2470 return out;
2471 }
2472 void Dagger_() {
2473 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2474 this->Conj_();
2475 this->Transpose_();
2476 }
2477
2478 void Trace_(const std::string &a, const std::string &b);
2479 void Trace_(const cytnx_int64 &a, const cytnx_int64 &b);
2480
2481 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Trace(const std::string &a, const std::string &b) {
2482 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor; the tensor type was adapted
2483 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
2484 out->Trace_(a, b);
2485 if (out->rank() == 0) {
2486 DenseUniTensor *tmp = new DenseUniTensor();
2487 tmp->_block = ((BlockFermionicUniTensor *)out.get())->_blocks[0];
2488 out = boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(tmp);
2489 }
2490 return out;
2491 }
2492 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Trace(const cytnx_int64 &a, const cytnx_int64 &b) {
2493 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor; the tensor type was adapted
2494 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
2495 out->Trace_(a, b);
2496 if (out->rank() == 0) {
2497 DenseUniTensor *tmp = new DenseUniTensor();
2498 tmp->_block = ((BlockFermionicUniTensor *)out.get())->_blocks[0];
2499 out = boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(tmp);
2500 }
2501 return out;
2502 }
2503
2504 Tensor Norm() const;

2510 const cytnx_complex128 &aux) const;

2512 const cytnx_complex64 &aux) const;
2513 const cytnx_double &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2514 const cytnx_double &aux) const;
2515 const cytnx_float &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2516 const cytnx_float &aux) const;
2517 const cytnx_uint64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2518 const cytnx_uint64 &aux) const;
2519 const cytnx_int64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2520 const cytnx_int64 &aux) const;
2521 const cytnx_uint32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2522 const cytnx_uint32 &aux) const;
2523 const cytnx_int32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2524 const cytnx_int32 &aux) const;
2525 const cytnx_uint16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2526 const cytnx_uint16 &aux) const;
2527 const cytnx_int16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2528 const cytnx_int16 &aux) const;
2529
2530 Scalar::Sproxy at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator);
2531 cytnx_complex128 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2532 const cytnx_complex128 &aux);
2533 cytnx_complex64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2534 const cytnx_complex64 &aux);
2535 cytnx_double &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_double &aux);
2536 cytnx_float &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_float &aux);
2537 cytnx_uint64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_uint64 &aux);
2538 cytnx_int64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_int64 &aux);
2539 cytnx_uint32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_uint32 &aux);
2540 cytnx_int32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_int32 &aux);
2541 cytnx_uint16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_uint16 &aux);
2542 cytnx_int16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_int16 &aux);
2543
2544 void _save_dispatch(std::fstream &f) const;
2545 void _load_dispatch(std::fstream &f);
2546
2547 // this will remove the [q_index]-th qnum at [bond_idx]-th Bond!
2548 void truncate_(const std::string &label, const cytnx_uint64 &q_index);
2549 void truncate_(const cytnx_int64 &bond_idx, const cytnx_uint64 &q_index);
2550
2551 void Add_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
2552 void Add_(const Scalar &rhs) {
2553 cytnx_error_msg(true,
2554 "[ERROR] Cannot perform elementwise arithmetic '+' between Scalar and "
2555 "BlockFermionicUniTensor.\n %s "
2556 "\n",
2557 "This operation would destroy the block structure. [Suggest] Avoid or use "
2558 "get/put_block(s) to do operation on blocks.");
2559 }
2560
2561 void Mul_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
2562 void Mul_(const Scalar &rhs);
2563
2564 void Sub_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
2565 void Sub_(const Scalar &rhs) {
2566 cytnx_error_msg(true,
2567 "[ERROR] Cannot perform elementwise arithmetic '-' between Scalar and "
2568 "BlockFermionicUniTensor.\n %s "
2569 "\n",
2570 "This operation would destroy the block structure. [Suggest] Avoid or use "
2571 "get/put_block(s) to do operation on blocks.");
2572 }
2573 void lSub_(const Scalar &lhs) {
2574 cytnx_error_msg(true,
2575 "[ERROR] Cannot perform elementwise arithmetic '-' between Scalar and "
2576 "BlockFermionicUniTensor.\n %s "
2577 "\n",
2578 "This operation would destroy the block structure. [Suggest] Avoid or use "
2579 "get/put_block(s) to do operation on blocks.");
2580 }
2581
2582 void Div_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
2583 void Div_(const Scalar &rhs);
2584 void lDiv_(const Scalar &lhs) {
2585 cytnx_error_msg(true,
2586 "[ERROR] Cannot perform elementwise arithmetic '/' between Scalar and "
2587 "BlockFermionicUniTensor.\n %s "
2588 "\n",
2589 "This operation would cause division by zero on non-block elements. "
2590 "[Suggest] Avoid or use get/put_block(s) to do operation on blocks.");
2591 }
2592 void from_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs, bool force, cytnx_double tol = 0.);
2593
2594 void group_basis_();
2595
2596 void combineBond(const std::vector<std::string> &indicators, const bool &force = false);
2597 void combineBonds(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indicators, const bool &force = false);
2598 void combineBonds(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indicators, const bool &force,
2599 const bool &by_label);
2600 void combineBonds(const std::vector<std::string> &indicators, const bool &force = false);
2601
2602 const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &get_qindices(const cytnx_uint64 &bidx) const {
2603 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2604 cytnx_error_msg(
2605 bidx >= this->Nblocks(),
2606 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] bidx out of bound! only %d blocks in current UTen.\n",
2607 this->Nblocks());
2608 return this->_inner_to_outer_idx[bidx];
2609 }
2610 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &get_qindices(const cytnx_uint64 &bidx) {
2611 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2612 cytnx_error_msg(
2613 bidx >= this->Nblocks(),
2614 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] bidx out of bound! only %d blocks in current UTen.\n",
2615 this->Nblocks());
2616 return this->_inner_to_outer_idx[bidx];
2617 }
2618
2619 const vec2d<cytnx_uint64> &get_itoi() const {
2620 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2621 return this->_inner_to_outer_idx;
2622 }
2623 vec2d<cytnx_uint64> &get_itoi() {
2624 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2625 return this->_inner_to_outer_idx;
2626 }
2627
2628 void beauty_print_block(std::ostream &os, const cytnx_uint64 &Nin, const cytnx_uint64 &Nout,
2629 const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &qn_indices,
2630 const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const Tensor &block) const;
2631 };
2633
2634 //======================================================================
2635
2637 class UniTensor_options {
2638 public:
2639 bool _is_diag;
2640 int _dtype;
2641 int _device;
2642 int _rowrank;
2643
2644 UniTensor_options() {
2645 this->_is_diag = false;
2646 this->_dtype = Type.Double;
2647 this->_device = Device.cpu;
2648 this->_rowrank = -1;
2649 }
2650
2651 UniTensor_options(const UniTensor_options &rhs) {
2652 this->_is_diag = rhs._is_diag;
2653 this->_dtype = rhs._dtype;
2654 this->_device = rhs._device;
2655 this->_rowrank = rhs._rowrank;
2656 }
2657
2658 UniTensor_options &operator=(const UniTensor_options &rhs) {
2659 this->_is_diag = rhs._is_diag;
2660 this->_dtype = rhs._dtype;
2661 this->_device = rhs._device;
2662 this->_rowrank = rhs._rowrank;
2663 return *this;
2664 }
2665
2666 UniTensor_options &is_diag(const bool &in) {
2667 this->_is_diag = in;
2668 return *this;
2669 }
2670 UniTensor_options &dtype(const int &in) {
2671 this->_dtype = in;
2672 return *this;
2673 }
2674 UniTensor_options &device(const int &in) {
2675 this->_device = in;
2676 return *this;
2677 }
2678 UniTensor_options &rowrank(const int &in) {
2679 this->_rowrank = in;
2680 return *this;
2681 }
2682 };
2684
2686 class UniTensor {
2687 public:
2689 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> _impl;
2690 UniTensor() : _impl(new UniTensor_base()){};
2691 UniTensor(const UniTensor &rhs) { this->_impl = rhs._impl; }
2692 UniTensor &operator=(const UniTensor &rhs) {
2693 this->_impl = rhs._impl;
2694 return *this;
2695 }
2697
2699
2725 explicit UniTensor(const Tensor &in_tensor, const bool &is_diag = false,
2726 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1,
2727 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {}, const std::string &name = "")
2728 : _impl(new UniTensor_base()) {
2729 this->Init(in_tensor, is_diag, rowrank, in_labels, name);
2730 }
2748 void Init(const Tensor &in_tensor, const bool &is_diag = false, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1,
2749 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {}, const std::string &name = "") {
2750 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(new DenseUniTensor());
2751 out->Init_by_Tensor(in_tensor, is_diag, rowrank, name);
2752 this->_impl = out;
2753 if (in_labels.size() != 0) this->set_labels(in_labels);
2754 }
2756
2758
2775 UniTensor(const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
2776 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
2777 const int &device = Device.cpu, const bool &is_diag = false,
2778 const std::string &name = "")
2779 : _impl(new UniTensor_base()) {
2780 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
2781 cytnx_warning_msg(
2782 true,
2783 "[DEBUG] message: entry for UniTensor(const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const "
2784 "std::vector<std::string> &in_labels={}, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank=-1, const unsigned "
2785 "int "
2786 "&dtype=Type.Double, const int &device = Device.cpu, const bool &is_diag=false)%s",
2787 "\n");
2788 #endif
2789 this->Init(bonds, in_labels, rowrank, dtype, device, is_diag, name);
2790 }
2791
2793 /* [developing]
2794 void Init(const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
2795 const UniTensor_options &UToptions = UniTensor_options(), const std::string &name =
2796 ""){ this->Init(bonds,in_labels, UToptions._rowrank, UToptions._dtype , UToptions._device ,
2797 UToptions._is_diag,
2798 name);
2799 }
2800 */
2802
2822 UniTensor &Init(const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
2823 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
2824 const int &device = Device.cpu, const bool &is_diag = false,
2825 const std::string &name = "") {
2826 // checking type:
2827 bool is_sym = false;
2828 int sym_fver = -1;
2829 bool fermionic = false;
2830
2831 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < bonds.size(); i++) {
2832 // check
2833 if (bonds[i].syms().size() != 0) {
2834 is_sym = true;
2835 if (sym_fver == -1)
2836 sym_fver = bonds[i]._impl->_degs.size();
2837 else {
2838 cytnx_error_msg((bool(sym_fver) ^ bool(bonds[i]._impl->_degs.size())),
2839 "[ERROR] When initializing a UniTensor with symmetries, all Bonds must "
2840 "be in the same format!%s",
2841 "\n");
2842 }
2843 if (!fermionic) {
2844 std::vector<Symmetry> symms = bonds[i].syms();
2845 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < symms.size(); i++) {
2846 if (symms[i].is_fermionic()) fermionic = true;
2847 }
2848 }
2849 } else
2850 cytnx_error_msg(
2851 is_sym, "[ERROR] Cannot have bonds with mixing of symmetry and non-symmetry.%s", "\n");
2852 }
2853
2854 // dynamical dispatch:
2855 if (is_sym) {
2856 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
2857 cytnx_warning_msg(true, "[DEBUG] message: entry dispatch: UniTensor: symmetric%s", "\n");
2858 #endif
2859 cytnx_error_msg(
2860 sym_fver < 1,
2861 "[ERROR] Symmetric tensor, but no degeneracies given. The UniTensor seems broken.%s",
2862 "\n");
2863 if (fermionic) {
2864 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(new BlockFermionicUniTensor());
2865 this->_impl = out;
2866 } else {
2867 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(new BlockUniTensor());
2868 this->_impl = out;
2869 }
2870 } else {
2871 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(new DenseUniTensor());
2872 this->_impl = out;
2873 }
2874 this->_impl->Init(bonds, in_labels, rowrank, dtype, device, is_diag, false, name);
2875 return *this;
2876 }
2877
2884 UniTensor &set_name(const std::string &in) {
2885 this->_impl->set_name(in);
2886 return *this;
2887 }

2978 "Please use "

2980 "instead.")]] UniTensor &
2981 set_labels(const std::initializer_list<char *> &new_labels) {

2985 [](char *x) -> std::string { return std::string(x); });
2986
2987 this->_impl->set_labels(vs);
2988 return *this;
2989 }

3008 template <class T>
3009 T &item() {
3010 cytnx_error_msg(this->is_blockform(),
3011 "[ERROR] Cannot use item on UniTensor with Symmetry.\n suggestion: use "
3012 "get_block()/get_blocks() first.%s",
3013 "\n");
3014
3015 DenseUniTensor *tmp = static_cast<DenseUniTensor *>(this->_impl.get());
3016 return tmp->_block.item<T>();
3017 }
3018
3019 Scalar::Sproxy item() const {
3020 cytnx_error_msg(this->is_blockform(),
3021 "[ERROR] Cannot use item on UniTensor with Symmetry.\n suggestion: use "
3022 "get_block()/get_blocks() first.%s",
3023 "\n");
3024
3025 DenseUniTensor *tmp = static_cast<DenseUniTensor *>(this->_impl.get());
3026 return tmp->_block.item();
3027 }

3295 transform(new_lbls.begin(), new_lbls.end(), vs.begin(),
3296 [](char *x) -> std::string { return std::string(x); });
3297
3298 UniTensor out;
3299 out._impl = this->_impl->relabel(vs);
3300 return out;
3301 }

3316
3317 UniTensor out;
3318 out._impl = this->_impl->relabels(vs);
3319 return out;
3320 }

3411 "instead.")]] UniTensor &

3417
3422 UniTensor relabel(const std::initializer_list<char *> &old_labels,
3423 const std::initializer_list<char *> &new_labels) const {
3424 std::vector<char *> new_lbls(new_labels);
3425 std::vector<std::string> vs(new_lbls.size());
3426 transform(new_lbls.begin(), new_lbls.end(), vs.begin(),
3427 [](char *x) -> std::string { return std::string(x); });
3428
3429 std::vector<char *> old_lbls(old_labels);
3430 std::vector<std::string> vs_old(old_lbls.size());
3431 transform(old_lbls.begin(), old_lbls.end(), vs_old.begin(),
3432 [](char *x) -> std::string { return std::string(x); });
3433
3434 return this->relabel(vs_old, vs);
3435 }
3436
3442 [[deprecated(
3443 "Please use "
3444 "UniTensor relabel(const std::initializer_list<char *> &old_labels, const "
3445 "std::initializer_list<char *> &new_labels) const "
3446 "instead.")]] UniTensor
3447 relabels(const std::initializer_list<char *> &old_labels,
3448 const std::initializer_list<char *> &new_labels) const {
3449 std::vector<char *> new_lbls(new_labels);
3450 std::vector<std::string> vs(new_lbls.size());
3451 transform(new_lbls.begin(), new_lbls.end(), vs.begin(),
3452 [](char *x) -> std::string { return std::string(x); });
3453
3454 std::vector<char *> old_lbls(old_labels);
3455 std::vector<std::string> vs_old(old_lbls.size());
3456 transform(old_lbls.begin(), old_lbls.end(), vs_old.begin(),
3457 [](char *x) -> std::string { return std::string(x); });
3458
3459 return this->relabels(vs_old, vs);
3460 }
3461
3466 UniTensor &relabel_(const std::initializer_list<char *> &old_labels,
3467 const std::initializer_list<char *> &new_labels) {
3468 std::vector<char *> new_lbls(new_labels);
3469 std::vector<std::string> vs(new_lbls.size());
3470 transform(new_lbls.begin(), new_lbls.end(), vs.begin(),
3471 [](char *x) -> std::string { return std::string(x); });
3472
3473 std::vector<char *> old_lbls(old_labels);
3474 std::vector<std::string> vs_old(old_lbls.size());
3475 transform(old_lbls.begin(), old_lbls.end(), vs_old.begin(),
3476 [](char *x) -> std::string { return std::string(x); });
3477
3478 this->relabel_(vs_old, vs);
3479 return *this;
3480 }

3578 UniTensor astype(const unsigned int &dtype) const {
3579 UniTensor out;
3580 if (this->dtype() == dtype) {
3581 out._impl = this->_impl;
3582 } else {
3583 out._impl = this->_impl->astype(dtype);
3584 }
3585 return out;
3586 }

3625 transform(mprs.begin(), mprs.end(), vs.begin(),
