3900
3909 template <class T>
3910 T &at(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) {
3911 if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Block || this->uten_type() == UTenType.BlockFermionic) {
3912 // [NEW] this will not check if it exists, if it is not then error will throw!
3913 T aux;
3914 return this->_impl->at_for_sparse(locator, aux);
3915 } else if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Dense) {
3916 return this->get_block_().at<T>(locator);
3917 } else {
3918 cytnx_error_msg(this->uten_type() == UTenType.Void,
3919 "[ERROR] UniTensor is not initialized and of type Void.%s", "\n");
3920 cytnx_error_msg(
3921 this->uten_type() == UTenType.Sparse,
3922 "[ERROR] SparseUniTensor is deprecated. Use BlockUniTensor or LinOp instead.%s", "\n");
3923 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] UniTensor type '%s' not supported\n",
3924 this->uten_type_str().c_str());
3925 }
3926 }
3927
3936 template <class T>
3937 const T &at(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const {
3938 if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Block || this->uten_type() == UTenType.BlockFermionic) {
3939 // [NEW] this will not check if it exists, if it is not then error will throw!
3940 T aux;
3941 return this->_impl->at_for_sparse(locator, aux);
3942 } else if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Dense) {
3943 return this->get_block_().at<T>(locator);
3944 } else {
3945 cytnx_error_msg(this->uten_type() == UTenType.Void,
3946 "[ERROR] UniTensor is not initialized and of type Void.%s", "\n");
3947 cytnx_error_msg(
3948 this->uten_type() == UTenType.Sparse,
3949 "[ERROR] SparseUniTensor is deprecated. Use BlockUniTensor or LinOp instead.%s", "\n");
3950 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] UniTensor type '%s' not supported\n",
3951 this->uten_type_str().c_str());
3952 }
3953 }
3954
3955 template <class T>
3956 const T &at(const std::vector<std::string> &labels,
3957 const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const {
3958 // giving label <-> locator one to one corresponding, return the element:
3959 cytnx_error_msg(locator.size() != labels.size(),
3960 "[ERROR][at] length of list should be the same for label and locator.%s",
3961 "\n");
3962 cytnx_error_msg(
3963 labels.size() != this->rank(),
3964 "[ERROR][at] length of lists must be the same as UniTensor.rank (# of legs)%s", "\n");
3965 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> new_locator(this->rank());
3966 cytnx_uint64 new_loc;
3967 for (int i = 0; i < labels.size(); i++) {
3968 auto res = std::find(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), this->_impl->_labels.end(), labels[i]);
3969 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_impl->_labels.end(),
3970 "[ERROR] label:%s does not exist in current UniTensor.\n",
3971 labels[i].c_str());
3972 new_loc = std::distance(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), res);
3973 new_locator[new_loc] = locator[i];
3974 }
3975 return this->at<T>(new_locator);
3976 }
3977 template <class T>
3978 T &at(const std::vector<std::string> &labels, const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) {
3979 // giving label <-> locator one to one corresponding, return the element:
3980 cytnx_error_msg(locator.size() != labels.size(),
3981 "[ERROR][at] length of list should be the same for label and locator.%s",
3982 "\n");
3983 cytnx_error_msg(
3984 labels.size() != this->rank(),
3985 "[ERROR][at] length of lists must be the same as UniTensor.rank (# of legs)%s", "\n");
3986 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> new_locator(this->rank());
3987 cytnx_uint64 new_loc;
3988 for (int i = 0; i < labels.size(); i++) {
3989 auto res = std::find(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), this->_impl->_labels.end(), labels[i]);
3990 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_impl->_labels.end(),
3991 "[ERROR] label:%s does not exist in current UniTensor.\n",
3992 labels[i].c_str());
3993 new_loc = std::distance(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), res);
3994 new_locator[new_loc] = locator[i];
3995 }
3996 return this->at<T>(new_locator);
3997 }
3998
4006 const Scalar::Sproxy at(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const {
4007 if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Block || this->uten_type() == UTenType.BlockFermionic) {
4008 return this->_impl->at_for_sparse(locator);
4009 } else if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Dense) {
4010 return this->get_block_().at(locator);
4011 } else {
4012 cytnx_error_msg(this->uten_type() == UTenType.Void,
4013 "[ERROR] UniTensor is not initialized and of type Void.%s", "\n");
4014 cytnx_error_msg(
4015 this->uten_type() == UTenType.Sparse,
4016 "[ERROR] SparseUniTensor is deprecated. Use BlockUniTensor or LinOp instead.%s", "\n");
4017 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] UniTensor type '%s' not supported\n",
4018 this->uten_type_str().c_str());
4019 }
4020 }
4021
4029 Scalar::Sproxy at(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) {
4030 if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Block || this->uten_type() == UTenType.BlockFermionic) {
4031 return this->_impl->at_for_sparse(locator);
4032 } else if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Dense) {
4033 return this->get_block_().at(locator);
4034 } else {
4035 cytnx_error_msg(this->uten_type() == UTenType.Void,
4036 "[ERROR] UniTensor is not initialized and of type Void.%s", "\n");
4037 cytnx_error_msg(
4038 this->uten_type() == UTenType.Sparse,
4039 "[ERROR] SparseUniTensor is deprecated. Use BlockUniTensor or LinOp instead.%s", "\n");
4040 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] UniTensor type '%s' not supported\n",
4041 this->uten_type_str().c_str());
4042 }
4043 }
4044
4045 Scalar::Sproxy at(const std::vector<std::string> &labels,
4046 const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) {
4047 // giving label <-> locator one to one corresponding, return the element:
4048 cytnx_error_msg(locator.size() != labels.size(),
4049 "[ERROR][at] length of list should be the same for label and locator.%s",
4050 "\n");
4051 cytnx_error_msg(
4052 labels.size() != this->rank(),
4053 "[ERROR][at] length of lists must be the same as UniTensor.rank (# of legs)%s", "\n");
4054 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> new_locator(this->rank());
4055 cytnx_uint64 new_loc;
4056 for (int i = 0; i < labels.size(); i++) {
4057 auto res = std::find(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), this->_impl->_labels.end(), labels[i]);
4058 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_impl->_labels.end(),
4059 "[ERROR] label:%s does not exist in current UniTensor.\n",
4060 labels[i].c_str());
4061 new_loc = std::distance(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), res);
4062 new_locator[new_loc] = locator[i];
4063 }
4064 return this->at(new_locator);
4065 }
4066
4067 const Scalar::Sproxy at(const std::vector<std::string> &labels,
4068 const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const {
4069 // giving label <-> locator one to one corresponding, return the element:
4070 cytnx_error_msg(locator.size() != labels.size(),
4071 "[ERROR][at] length of list should be the same for label and locator.%s",
4072 "\n");
4073 cytnx_error_msg(
4074 labels.size() != this->rank(),
4075 "[ERROR][at] length of lists must be the same as UniTensor.rank (# of legs)%s", "\n");
4076 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> new_locator(this->rank());
4077 cytnx_uint64 new_loc;
4078 for (int i = 0; i < labels.size(); i++) {
4079 auto res = std::find(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), this->_impl->_labels.end(), labels[i]);
4080 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_impl->_labels.end(),
4081 "[ERROR] label:%s does not exist in current UniTensor.\n",
4082 labels[i].c_str());
4083 new_loc = std::distance(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), res);
4084 new_locator[new_loc] = locator[i];
4085 }
4086 return this->at(new_locator);
4087 }
4088
4089 // return a copy of the block with the given block index
4098 Tensor get_block(const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) const { return this->_impl->get_block(idx); };
4099 //================================
4100 // return a clone of block
4112 Tensor get_block(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx, const bool &force = false) const {
4113 return this->_impl->get_block(qidx, force);
4114 }
4115
4116 Tensor get_block(const std::vector<std::string> &labels, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx,
4117 const bool &force = false) const {
4118 cytnx_error_msg(
4119 labels.size() != qidx.size(),
4120 "[ERROR][get_block] length of lists must be the same for both lables and qnidices%s", "\n");
4121 cytnx_error_msg(labels.size() != this->rank(),
4122 "[ERROR][get_block] length of lists must be the rank (# of legs)%s", "\n");
4123
4124 std::vector<cytnx_int64> loc_id(this->rank());
4125 std::vector<cytnx_int64> new_qidx(this->rank());
4126
4127 cytnx_uint64 new_loc;
4128 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> new_order(this->rank());
4129 for (int i = 0; i < labels.size(); i++) {
4130 auto res = std::find(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), this->_impl->_labels.end(), labels[i]);
4131 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_impl->_labels.end(),
4132 "[ERROR][get_block] label:%s does not exists in current Tensor.\n",
4133 labels[i].c_str());
4134 new_loc = std::distance(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), res);
4135 new_qidx[new_loc] = qidx[i];
4136 new_order[i] = new_loc;
4137 }
4138 auto out = this->_impl->get_block(new_qidx, force);
4139 if (out.dtype() != Type.Void) out.permute_(new_order);
4140 return out;
4141 }
4142
4147 Tensor get_block(const std::initializer_list<cytnx_int64> &qnum,
4148 const bool &force = false) const {
4149 std::vector<cytnx_int64> tmp = qnum;
4150 return get_block(tmp, force);
4151 }
4152
4157 Tensor get_block(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &qnum, const bool &force = false) const {
4158 std::vector<cytnx_int64> iqnum(qnum.begin(), qnum.end());
4159 return this->_impl->get_block(iqnum, force);
4160 }
4161
4162 Tensor get_block(const std::vector<std::string> &labels, const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &qidx,
4163 const bool &force = false) const {
4164 std::vector<cytnx_int64> iqnum(qidx.begin(), qidx.end());
4165 return this->get_block(labels, iqnum, force);
4166 }
4167
4176 const Tensor &get_block_(const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) const {
4177 return this->_impl->get_block_(idx);
4178 }
4179
4184 Tensor &get_block_(const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) { return this->_impl->get_block_(idx); }
4185
4197 Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx, const bool &force = false) {
4198 return this->_impl->get_block_(qidx, force);
4199 }
4200
4217 // developer note: Tensor is not the same object (Thus Tensor instead of Tensor& ),
4218 // since we permute! but they have shared data memory.
4219 Tensor get_block_(const std::vector<std::string> &labels, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx,
4220 const bool &force = false) {
4221 cytnx_error_msg(
4222 labels.size() != qidx.size(),
4223 "[ERROR][get_block] length of lists must be the same for both lables and qnidices%s", "\n");
4224 cytnx_error_msg(labels.size() != this->rank(),
4225 "[ERROR][get_block] length of lists must be the rank (# of legs)%s", "\n");
4226
4227 std::vector<cytnx_int64> loc_id(this->rank());
4228 std::vector<cytnx_int64> new_qidx(this->rank());
4229
4230 cytnx_uint64 new_loc;
4231 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> new_order(this->rank());
4232 for (int i = 0; i < labels.size(); i++) {
4233 auto res = std::find(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), this->_impl->_labels.end(), labels[i]);
4234 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_impl->_labels.end(),
4235 "[ERROR][get_block] label:%s does not exists in current Tensor.\n",
4236 labels[i].c_str());
4237 new_loc = std::distance(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), res);
4238 new_qidx[new_loc] = qidx[i];
4239 new_order[i] = new_loc;
4240 }
4241 auto out = this->_impl->get_block_(new_qidx, force);
4242 if (out.dtype() != Type.Void) {
4243 out = out.permute(new_order);
4244 }
4245 return out;
4246 }
4247
4251 Tensor &get_block_(const std::initializer_list<cytnx_int64> &qidx, const bool &force = false) {
4252 std::vector<cytnx_int64> tmp = qidx;
4253 return get_block_(tmp, force);
4254 }
4255
4259 Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &qidx, const bool &force = false) {
4260 std::vector<cytnx_int64> iqidx(qidx.begin(), qidx.end());
4261 return get_block_(iqidx, force);
4262 }
4263
4264 Tensor get_block_(const std::vector<std::string> &labels, const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &qidx,
4265 const bool &force = false) {
4266 std::vector<cytnx_int64> iqidx(qidx.begin(), qidx.end());
4267 return get_block_(labels, iqidx, force);
4268 }
4269 //================================
4270
4271 // this only work for non-symm tensor. return a shared view of block
4275 const Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx,
4276 const bool &force = false) const {
4277 return this->_impl->get_block_(qidx, force);
4278 }
4279
4283 const Tensor &get_block_(const std::initializer_list<cytnx_int64> &qidx,
4284 const bool &force = false) const {
4285 std::vector<cytnx_int64> tmp = qidx;
4286 return this->_impl->get_block_(tmp, force);
4287 }
4288
4292 const Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &qidx,
4293 const bool &force = false) const {
4294 std::vector<cytnx_int64> iqidx(qidx.begin(), qidx.end());
4295 return get_block_(iqidx, force);
4296 }
4297
4298 //================================
4310 //[dev]
4311 std::vector<Tensor> get_blocks() const { return this->_impl->get_blocks(); }
4312
4321 //[dev]
4322 const std::vector<Tensor> &get_blocks_(const bool &silent = false) const {
4323 return this->_impl->get_blocks_(silent);
4324 }
4325
4329 //[dev]
4330 std::vector<Tensor> &get_blocks_(const bool &silent = false) {
4331 return this->_impl->get_blocks_(silent);
4332 }
4333
4343 UniTensor &put_block(const Tensor &in, const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) {
4344 this->_impl->put_block(in, idx);
4345 return *this;
4346 }
4347
4353 [[deprecated(
4354 "Please use "
4355 "UniTensor &put_block(const Tensor &in, const cytnx_uint64 &idx) "
4356 "instead.")]] UniTensor &
4357 put_block(const Tensor &in, const cytnx_uint64 &idx, const bool &force) {
4358 this->_impl->put_block(in, idx);
4359 return *this;
4360 }
4361
4371 UniTensor &put_block(const Tensor &in_tens, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx) {
4372 this->_impl->put_block(in_tens, qidx);
4373 return *this;
4374 }
4375
4381 [[deprecated(
4382 "Please use "
4383 "UniTensor &put_block(const Tensor &in_tens, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx) "
4384 "instead.")]] UniTensor &
4385 put_block(const Tensor &in_tens, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx, const bool &force) {
4386 this->_impl->put_block(in_tens, qidx);
4387 return *this;
4388 }
4389
4398 UniTensor &put_block(Tensor &in, const std::vector<std::string> &lbls,
4399 const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx) {
4400 cytnx_error_msg(
4401 lbls.size() != qidx.size(),
4402 "[ERROR][put_block] length of lists must be the same for both lables and qnidices%s", "\n");
4403 cytnx_error_msg(lbls.size() != this->rank(),
4404 "[ERROR][put_block] length of lists must be the rank (# of legs)%s", "\n");
4405
4406 std::vector<cytnx_int64> loc_id(this->rank());
4407 std::vector<cytnx_int64> new_qidx(this->rank());
4408
4409 cytnx_uint64 new_loc;
4410 // std::vector<cytnx_uint64> new_order(this->rank());
4411 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inv_order(this->rank());
4412 for (int i = 0; i < lbls.size(); i++) {
4413 auto res = std::find(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), this->_impl->_labels.end(), lbls[i]);
4414 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_impl->_labels.end(),
4415 "[ERROR][put_block] label:%s does not exists in current Tensor.\n",
4416 lbls[i].c_str());
4417 new_loc = std::distance(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), res);
4418 new_qidx[new_loc] = qidx[i];
4419 // new_order[i] = new_loc;
4420 inv_order[new_loc] = i;
4421 }
4422 this->_impl->put_block(in.permute(inv_order), new_qidx);
4423 return *this;
4424 }
4425
4431 [[deprecated(
4432 "Please use "
4433 "UniTensor &put_block(Tensor &in, const std::vector<std::string> &lbls, const "
4434 "std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx) "
4435 "instead.")]] UniTensor &
4436 put_block(Tensor &in, const std::vector<std::string> &lbls,
4437 const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx, const bool &force) {
4438 return put_block(in, lbls, qidx);
4439 }
4440
4450 UniTensor &put_block_(Tensor &in, const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) {
4451 this->_impl->put_block_(in, idx);
4452 return *this;
4453 }
4454
4464 UniTensor &put_block_(Tensor &in, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx) {
4465 this->_impl->put_block_(in, qidx);
4466 return *this;
4467 }
4468
4474 [[deprecated(
4475 "Please use "
4476 "UniTensor &put_block_(Tensor &in, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx) "
4477 "instead.")]] UniTensor &
4478 put_block_(Tensor &in, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx, const bool &force) {
4479 this->_impl->put_block_(in, qidx);
4480 return *this;
4481 }
4482
4491 UniTensor &put_block_(Tensor &in, const std::vector<std::string> &lbls,
4492 const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx) {
4493 cytnx_error_msg(
4494 lbls.size() != qidx.size(),
4495 "[ERROR][put_block_] length of lists must be the same for both lables and qnidices%s",
4496 "\n");
4497 cytnx_error_msg(lbls.size() != this->rank(),
4498 "[ERROR][put_block_] length of lists must be the rank (# of legs)%s", "\n");
4499
4500 std::vector<cytnx_int64> loc_id(this->rank());
4501 std::vector<cytnx_int64> new_qidx(this->rank());
4502
4503 cytnx_uint64 new_loc;
4504 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> new_order(this->rank());
4505 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inv_order(this->rank());
4506 for (int i = 0; i < lbls.size(); i++) {
4507 auto res = std::find(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), this->_impl->_labels.end(), lbls[i]);
4508 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_impl->_labels.end(),
4509 "[ERROR][put_block_] label:%s does not exists in current Tensor.\n",
4510 lbls[i].c_str());
4511 new_loc = std::distance(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), res);
4512 new_qidx[new_loc] = qidx[i];
4513 new_order[i] = new_loc;
4514 inv_order[new_loc] = i;
4515 }
4516 in.permute_(inv_order);
4517 this->_impl->put_block_(in, new_qidx);
4518 in.permute_(new_order);
4519 return *this;
4520 }
4521
4527 [[deprecated(
4528 "Please use "
4529 "UniTensor &put_block_(Tensor &in, const std::vector<std::string> &lbls, const "
4530 "std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx) "
4531 "instead.")]] UniTensor &
4532 put_block_(Tensor &in, const std::vector<std::string> &lbls,
4533 const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx, const bool &force) {
4534 return put_block_(in, lbls, qidx);
4535 }
4536
4552 UniTensor get(const std::vector<Accessor> &accessors) const {
4553 UniTensor out;
4554 out._impl = this->_impl->get(accessors);
4555 return out;
4556 }
4557
4562 UniTensor operator[](const std::vector<cytnx::Accessor> &accessors) const {
4563 UniTensor out;
4564 out._impl = this->_impl->get(accessors);
4565 return out;
4566 }
4567 UniTensor operator[](const std::initializer_list<cytnx::Accessor> &accessors) const {
4568 std::vector<cytnx::Accessor> acc_in = accessors;
4569 return this->get(acc_in);
4570 }
4571 UniTensor operator[](const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &accessors) const {
4572 std::vector<cytnx::Accessor> acc_in;
4573 for (cytnx_int64 i = 0; i < accessors.size(); i++) {
4574 acc_in.push_back(cytnx::Accessor(accessors[i]));
4575 }
4576 return this->get(acc_in);
4577 }
4578 UniTensor operator[](const std::initializer_list<cytnx_int64> &accessors) const {
4579 std::vector<cytnx_int64> acc_in = accessors;
4580 return (*this)[acc_in];
4581 }
4582
4599 UniTensor &set(const std::vector<Accessor> &accessors, const Tensor &rhs) {
4600 this->_impl->set(accessors, rhs);
4601 return *this;
4602 }
4603 UniTensor &set(const std::vector<Accessor> &accessors, const UniTensor &rhs) {
4604 cytnx_error_msg(
4605 rhs.uten_type() != UTenType.Dense,
4606 "[ERROR] Cannot set elements from UniTensor with symmetry. Use at() instead.%s", "\n");
4607 cytnx_error_msg(this->is_diag(), "[ERROR] Cannot set UniTensor with is_diag=True.%s", "\n");
4608 cytnx_error_msg(rhs.is_diag(),
4609 "[ERROR] Cannot set UniTensor. incoming UniTensor is_diag=True.%s", "\n");
4610
4611 this->_impl->set(accessors, rhs.get_block());
4612 return *this;
4613 }
4614
4622 UniTensor reshape(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &new_shape, const cytnx_uint64 &rowrank = 0) {
4623 UniTensor out;
4624 out._impl = this->_impl->reshape(new_shape, rowrank);
4625 return out;
4626 }
4627
4634 UniTensor &reshape_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &new_shape,
4635 const cytnx_uint64 &rowrank = 0) {
4636 this->_impl->reshape_(new_shape, rowrank);
4637 return *this;
4638 }
4639
4650 UniTensor to_dense() {
4651 UniTensor out;
4652 out._impl = this->_impl->to_dense();
4653 return out;
4654 }
4655
4660 UniTensor &to_dense_() {
4661 this->_impl->to_dense_();
4662 return *this;
4663 }
4664
4670 [[deprecated(
4671 "Please use "
4672 "combineBond(const std::vector<std::string> &indicators, const bool &force) "
4673 "instead.")]] void
4674 combineBonds(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indicators, const bool &force,
4675 const bool &by_label) {
4676 this->_impl->combineBonds(indicators, force, by_label);
4677 }

4687 "instead.")]] void
4688 combineBonds(const std::vector<std::string> &indicators, const bool &force = false) {
4689 this->_impl->combineBonds(indicators, force);
4690 }
4691
4697 [[deprecated(
4698 "Please use "
4699 "combineBond(const std::vector<std::string> &indicators, const bool &force) "
4700 "instead.")]] void
4701 combineBonds(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indicators, const bool &force = false) {
4702 this->_impl->combineBonds(indicators, force);
4703 }
4704
4715 UniTensor &combineBond(const std::vector<std::string> &indicators, const bool &force = false) {
4716 this->_impl->combineBond(indicators, force);
4717 return *this;
4718 }
4719
4738 UniTensor contract(const UniTensor &inR, const bool &mv_elem_self = false,
4739 const bool &mv_elem_rhs = false) const {
4740 UniTensor out;
4741 out._impl = this->_impl->contract(inR._impl, mv_elem_self, mv_elem_rhs);
4742 return out;
4743 }
4744
4746
4754 std::vector<Bond> getTotalQnums(const bool physical = false) const {

4770 bool same_data(const UniTensor &rhs) const {
4771 // check same type:
4772 if (this->_impl->uten_type() != rhs._impl->uten_type()) return false;
4773
4774 return this->_impl->same_data(rhs._impl);
4775 }

5355 UniTensor Trace(const std::string &a, const std::string &b) const {
5356 UniTensor out;
5357 out._impl = this->_impl->Trace(a, b);
5358 return out;
5359 }
5360
5370 UniTensor Trace(const cytnx_int64 &a = 0, const cytnx_int64 &b = 1) const {
5371 UniTensor out;
5372 out._impl = this->_impl->Trace(a, b);
5373 return out;
5374 }
5375
5385 UniTensor &Trace_(const std::string &a, const std::string &b) {
5386 this->_impl->Trace_(a, b);
5387 if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Block || this->uten_type() == UTenType.BlockFermionic) {
5388 // handle if no leg left case for BlockUniTensor.
5389 if (this->rank() == 0) {
5390 DenseUniTensor *tmp = new DenseUniTensor();
5391 tmp->_block = this->get_blocks_(true)[0];
5392 this->_impl = boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(tmp);
5393 }
5394 }
5395 return *this;
5396 }
5397
5407 UniTensor &Trace_(const cytnx_int64 &a = 0, const cytnx_int64 &b = 1) {
5408 this->_impl->Trace_(a, b);
5409 if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Block || this->uten_type() == UTenType.BlockFermionic) {
5410 // handle if no leg left case for BlockUniTensor.
5411 if (this->rank() == 0) {
5412 DenseUniTensor *tmp = new DenseUniTensor();
5413 tmp->_block = this->get_blocks_(true)[0];
5414 this->_impl = boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(tmp);
5415 }
5416 }
5417 return *this;
5418 }
5419
5428 UniTensor Dagger() const {
5429 UniTensor out;
5430 out._impl = this->_impl->Dagger();
5431 return out;
5432 }

5442 UniTensor &Dagger_() {

5444 return *this;
5445 }

5522 // cytnx_error_msg(true,"[ERROR] invalid type%s","\n");

5524 return *this;
5525 }

5672
5673 // Generators:
5686 static UniTensor zeros(const cytnx_uint64 &Nelem,
5687 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5688 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double, const int &device = Device.cpu,
5689 const std::string &name = "") {
5690 return UniTensor(cytnx::zeros(Nelem, dtype, device), false, -1, in_labels, name);
5691 }
5692
5706 static UniTensor zeros(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &shape,
5707 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5708 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double, const int &device = Device.cpu,
5709 const std::string &name = "") {
5710 return UniTensor(cytnx::zeros(shape, dtype, device), false, -1, in_labels, name);
5711 }
5712
5724 static UniTensor ones(const cytnx_uint64 &Nelem, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5725 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double, const int &device = Device.cpu,
5726 const std::string &name = "") {
5727 return UniTensor(cytnx::ones(Nelem, dtype, device), false, -1, in_labels, name);
5728 }
5729
5743 static UniTensor identity(const cytnx_uint64 &dim,
5744 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5745 const cytnx_bool &is_diag = false,
5746 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
5747 const int &device = Device.cpu, const std::string &name = "") {
5748 if (is_diag) {
5749 return UniTensor(cytnx::ones(dim, dtype, device), is_diag, -1, in_labels, name);
5750 } else {
5751 return UniTensor(cytnx::identity(dim, dtype, device), is_diag, -1, in_labels, name);
5752 }
5753 }
5754
5770 static UniTensor eye(const cytnx_uint64 &dim, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5771 const cytnx_bool &is_diag = false, const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
5772 const int &device = Device.cpu, const std::string &name = "") {
5773 return identity(dim, in_labels, is_diag, dtype, device, name);
5774 }
5775
5788 static UniTensor ones(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &shape,
5789 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5790 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double, const int &device = Device.cpu,
5791 const std::string &name = "") {
5792 return UniTensor(cytnx::ones(shape, dtype, device), false, -1, in_labels, name);
5793 }
5794
5809 static UniTensor arange(const cytnx_int64 &Nelem,
5810 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5811 const std::string &name = "") {
5812 return UniTensor(cytnx::arange(Nelem), false, -1, in_labels, name);
5813 }
5814
5832 static UniTensor arange(const cytnx_double &start, const cytnx_double &end,
5833 const cytnx_double &step = 1,
5834 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5835 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double, const int &device = Device.cpu,
5836 const std::string &name = "") {
5837 return UniTensor(cytnx::arange(start, end, step, dtype, device), false, -1, in_labels, name);
5838 }
5839
5859 static UniTensor linspace(const cytnx_double &start, const cytnx_double &end,
5860 const cytnx_uint64 &Nelem, const bool &endpoint = true,
5861 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5862 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
5863 const int &device = Device.cpu, const std::string &name = "") {
5864 return UniTensor(cytnx::linspace(start, end, Nelem, endpoint, dtype, device), false, -1,
5865 in_labels, name);
5866 }
5867
5868 // Random Generators:
5887 static UniTensor normal(const cytnx_uint64 &Nelem, const double &mean, const double &std,
5888 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5889 const unsigned int &seed = cytnx::random::__static_random_device(),
5890 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double, const int &device = Device.cpu,
5891 const std::string &name = "");
5892
5911 static UniTensor normal(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &shape, const double &mean,
5912 const double &std, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5913 const unsigned int &seed = cytnx::random::__static_random_device(),
5914 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double, const int &device = Device.cpu,
5915 const std::string &name = "");
5916
5935 static UniTensor uniform(const cytnx_uint64 &Nelem, const double &low, const double &high,
5936 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5937 const unsigned int &seed = cytnx::random::__static_random_device(),
5938 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
5939 const int &device = Device.cpu, const std::string &name = "");
5940
5978 static UniTensor uniform(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &shape, const double &low,
5979 const double &high, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5980 const unsigned int &seed = cytnx::random::__static_random_device(),
5981 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
5982 const int &device = Device.cpu, const std::string &name = "");
5983
5984 // Inplace Random Generators:
5997 UniTensor &normal_(const double &mean, const double &std,
5998 const unsigned int &seed = cytnx::random::__static_random_device());
5999
6012 UniTensor &uniform_(const double &low = 0, const double &high = 1,
6013 const unsigned int &seed = cytnx::random::__static_random_device());
6014
6015 }; // class UniTensor
6016
6018 std::ostream &operator<<(std::ostream &os, const UniTensor &in);
6020
6033 UniTensor Contract(const UniTensor &inL, const UniTensor &inR, const bool &cacheL = false,
6034 const bool &cacheR = false);
6035
6048 UniTensor Contract(const std::vector<UniTensor> &TNs, const std::string &order,
6049 const bool &optimal);
6050
6056 [[deprecated(
6057 "Please use "
6058 "UniTensor Contract(const std::vector<UniTensor> &TNs, const std::string &order, const bool "
6059 "&optimal) "
6060 "instead.")]] UniTensor
6061 Contracts(const std::vector<UniTensor> &TNs, const std::string &order, const bool &optimal);
6062
6064 void _resolve_CT(std::vector<UniTensor> &TNlist);
6065 template <class... T>
6066 void _resolve_CT(std::vector<UniTensor> &TNlist, const UniTensor &in, const T &...args) {
6067 TNlist.push_back(in);
6068 _resolve_CT(TNlist, args...);
6069 }
6071
6083 template <class... T>
6084 UniTensor Contract(const UniTensor &in, const T &...args, const std::string &order,
6085 const bool &optimal) {
6086 std::vector<UniTensor> TNlist;
6087 _resolve_CT(TNlist, in, args...);
6088 return Contract(TNlist, order, optimal);
6089 }
6090
6096 template <class... T>
6097 [[deprecated(
6098 "Please use "
6099 "UniTensor Contract(const UniTensor &in, const T &...args, const std::string &order, const "
6100 "bool &optimal) "
6101 "instead.")]] UniTensor
6102 Contracts(const UniTensor &in, const T &...args, const std::string &order,
6103 const bool &optimal) {
6104 std::vector<UniTensor> TNlist;
6105 _resolve_CT(TNlist, in, args...);
6106 return Contracts(TNlist, order, optimal);
6107 }
6108
6109} // namespace cytnx
